title: Senior Appointment Setter (Digital Marketing Agency – AU Market)
description:
Location: Remote (must understand Australian market)



What This Role Actually Is



This is not a junior SDR blasting 100 calls/day.



You are:



Having high-quality, strategic conversations

Speaking with business owners and decision-makers

Handling objections confidently (price, timing, skepticism)

Booking qualified, high-intent appointments

Must-Have Experience

Proven experience booking appointments for digital marketing agencies

Experience working with Australian clients/market (non-negotiable)

Strong understanding of:

Paid ads (Meta, Google)

Lead generation funnels

ROI-driven marketing conversations

Track record of consistently booking calls that convert

What We Care About

Ability to control a sales conversation

Strong objection handling

Proper qualification (no low-quality leads)

Understanding of agency economics and client psychology

What We Don’t Want

Script readers

Call center mindset

Volume-over-quality approach

Lack of digital marketing understanding

Core Responsibilities

Outreach (LinkedIn, cold calls,
, DM)

Qualification calls

Booking high-intent appointments

CRM updates and pipeline management

Providing feedback to improve targeting and messaging

Key Skills

Objection handling (price, trust, timing)

Consultative selling

Confidence speaking with founders and business owners

Clear communication

Self-management and accountability

Application Requirement



Submit a 2–3 minute Loom video covering:



Your experience working with digital marketing agencies

Results achieved (appointments booked, show rate, close rate if available)

How you handle this objection:

“We’ve tried agencies before and it didn’t work”

How you would approach booking calls for Warren Digital

Bonus Points

Experience selling high-ticket services ($2k–$10k+/month retainers)

Familiarity with Australian industries (tradies, service businesses, etc.)

Experience working alongside closers

Compensation (Example Structure)

Base + per-show + per-close bonus

OR

Commission-heavy structure with higher upside

Short Job Ad Version



We’re looking for a high-level appointment setter to book quality calls for a growing digital marketing agency (Warren Digital).

Experience working with Australian clients

Background in digital marketing agencies

Strong objection handling skills



You’ll be speaking directly with business owners, focusing on quality conversations over volume.



To apply, submit a 2–3 minute Loom video explaining:



Your experience

Your results

How you handle objections



If you can’t sell in a Loom, you won’t sell on the phone.

title: Senior Full-Stack WordPress Developer (Ongoing Work – Australia)
description:
I’m looking for a senior full-stack WordPress developer for ongoing client work.



I’m based in Australia and need someone reliable who can work closely with me across a steady pipeline of:



New website builds

WooCommerce implementations

Upgrades, fixes, and optimisation



This is long-term work, not a one-off project.



What I’m looking for



A true generalist — someone confident across:



WordPress + WooCommerce

Front-end UX/UI implementation

Backend logic, integrations, and performance



You should be able to:

“Own the whole build — from UX/frontend through to backend, performance, and integrations”



What you’ll be doing

Build and enhance WordPress websites (primarily WordPress + WooCommerce)

Handle complex WooCommerce setups

Debug performance issues, plugin conflicts, and edge cases

Implement custom features properly (no hacks or shortcuts)

Manage deployments using staging, backups, and clean workflows

Must-have technical skills

WordPress / WooCommerce

Advanced WooCommerce setups (products, variations, shipping, checkout customisation)

Payment gateways and custom flows

Plugin conflict resolution and site stability

Development

Strong PHP + WordPress best practices (hooks, filters, custom templates)

Theme development and modification (child themes, overrides)

API integrations (REST APIs, webhooks, third-party tools)

Solid frontend skills (HTML, CSS, JS) for UX implementation and debugging

Performance & Quality

Core Web Vitals optimisation (caching, assets, image optimisation, etc.)

Technical SEO fundamentals (schema, indexing, redirects)

Debugging (logs, database issues, error tracing)

Comfortable with staging and deployment workflows

Page Builder Experience (Required)



You must be comfortable working with:



Elementor

WPBakery

Divi

Kadence

YOOtheme

Gutenberg (block editor)



And able to go beyond builders when needed.



How you work

Strong independent problem solver

Can take a task from brief to delivery without hand-holding

Clear communicator (updates, timelines, questions)

Reliable and consistent

Strong English

Ideally able to work within or close to Australian business hours

Application Requirement (Important)



To apply, please include:



1. Loom Video (required)



Record a short Loom (3–5 mins) covering:



Your experience with WordPress and WooCommerce

How you approach frontend UX and backend development

Walk through 3–5 Australian websites you like and explain why they are well built (UX, performance, structure, etc.)

Why you would be a strong fit for this role

2. Project Examples

2–3 recent WordPress / WooCommerce projects

What you specifically handled

Any complex challenges solved

3. Details

Your hourly rate (or typical project pricing)

Availability (hours/week)

Timezone / working hours

Your strongest technical areas

Final Notes



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent work.



Looking for someone who can become a key part of my team, not just a freelancer who disappears after one job.



Ready to start ASAP.

title: Short Form Video Editor (Viral Hooks, Retention Editing, AI Content)
description:
We are hiring a high-level short form video editor who understands how to create engaging, viral-style content — not just basic edits.



This role is for someone who knows how to hold attention, increase retention, and make content that performs.



You will be editing short-form videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok) for a fast-growing AI marketing brand that helps clinics get more bookings.



This is NOT basic editing.

We are looking for someone who understands:



* Fast-paced cuts and zooms

* Hook-first editing (first 1–2 seconds matter most)

* Subtitles that enhance retention (not just captions)

* B-roll, overlays, and visual storytelling

* 
-style inserts, pattern interrupts, and engagement triggers



Your job is to take talking-head style videos and turn them into highly engaging content.



---



WHAT YOU’LL DO:



* Edit 1–3 short form videos per day

* Add dynamic cuts, zooms, subtitles, and overlays

* Insert relevant B-roll and visual elements

* Improve retention and watch time

* Follow a clear content style (we will provide direction)



---



REQUIREMENTS:



* Strong experience editing short-form content

* Must understand viral editing styles (TikTok / Reels)

* Must be able to think creatively (not just follow instructions)

* Fast turnaround time

* Good English understanding



---



IMPORTANT:



To apply, include:



1. Your BEST 3 short-form edits (not long videos)

2. The word "FLOW" at the start of your application

3. A short explanation of what makes a video engaging



Applications without this will be ignored.



---



This is long-term work for the right person.

We are building a serious brand and need someone who can grow with us through out our ventures.

title: Long-term Video/Audio Editor: Transform Meditative Audio into Cinematic Course Modules
description:
I am a spiritual teacher building a premium course platform for spiritual seekers and students. I have several existing high-quality audio courses that I need to convert into beautiful, high-impact video courses for platforms like Insight Timer and my own private site.



This is not "social media" editing. This is about creating a deep, meditative, and cinematic learning experience. I am looking for a long-term premium partner—specifically a female collaborator with whom I can build a smooth, intuitive communication flow.



What You Will Do:

Audio First: Clean and polish my raw audio (noise removal, vocal warmth, and leveling). The voice is the most important part.



Visual Storytelling: Layer the audio with minimalist, high-definition B-roll, clean visuals



Course Creation: Convert 20-40 minute audio sessions into professional video modules.



Platform Ready: Export versions optimized for both desktop courses and mobile.



About You:

You have a "Hell Yes" attitude toward personal growth and spirituality. You don't just "edit"; you listen to the message.



You are an expert in video and audio editing and creation.



You understand that silence and pacing are just as important as the visuals.



You are looking for a long-term, part-time partnership, rather than one-off gigs.

title: Fleet Operations Manager – Private Car Rental & Gig Economy Specialist
description:
Part-Time (Leading to Full-Time)

We are a growing private vehicle rental company specializing in providing high-quality, reliable economy vehicles to gig economy drivers (Uber, Lyft, DoorDash etc ). We are looking for an experienced, proactive Operations Manager to help us start, maintain, and scale our fleet.



This is not a data-entry role. You will be the "nerve center" of the business, responsible for protecting our assets and ensuring our drivers are successful and compliant.

Key Responsibilities:



 * Driver Vetting & Onboarding: Conduct deep background checks using tools like Intelius. Verify gig-worker stats and driver history.

 * Fleet Security: Monitor GPS tracking systems (Goldstar/LoJack) daily. Manage "starter-disable" protocols for late payments.

 * Marketing & Social Proof: Execute "back-foot" marketing strategies in local driver
 groups to maintain a 0% vacancy rate.

 * Administrative Management: Manage digital contracts, collect signatures (and thumbprints), and organize maintenance schedules.

 * Scaling Research: Use marketplaces to find high-ROI vehicles (Ford Fusions, Toyota Camrys) that fit our "90-day payoff" criteria.

 * Customer Support: Act as the primary point of contact for driver issues, payment reminders, and maintenance coordination.



Requirements:



 * Industry Experience: Previous experience in car rentals (Turo, HyreCar, or Private Fleet Management) is highly preferred.

 * Technical Literacy: Familiarity with GPS tracking software and remote kill-switch interfaces.

 * Communication: Elite English verbal and written skills. You must be comfortable "firmly" communicating with drivers regarding payments.

 * Entrepreneurial Mindset: You understand the goal is ROI and asset protection. You don't wait for instructions; you solve problems.

 * Hours: Must be available to work during CST business hours.



How to Apply:

 * Send a brief summary of your experience specifically in the automotive or rental industry.

 * Tell me which GPS or tracking software you have used in the past.

 * Use the subject line: "The Sauce: Fleet Manager Application"

title: Social Media Marketing Manager & Executive Assistant Support Role
description:
Looking for our next Social Media Marketing Manager & Executive Assistant 



We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency, education & consulting business based in Australia Sydney, specialising in Meta Ads, content strategy, sales funnels, and conversion-focused marketing for service-based businesses.

We don’t do fluffy marketing, and we are driven by results.

Everything we create is designed to drive leads, sales, and measurable growth. Our clients range from health and fitness brands, online coaches, ecommerce and education businesses - all looking to generate more leads/sales & scale.



We’re now at the stage where execution speed matters more than ever, and we’re building a lean, small high performance to support that growth.

If you like moving fast, taking ownership, and actually seeing the impact of your work… you’ll fit right in.

We are a non-corporate business and don’t do things conventionally.



We’re looking for an experienced Social Media Marketing Manager/Executive Assistant to support the execution of content, paid ads, landing pages, automations, graphic design, day-to-day marketing operations and some EA admin work to support the founder



This role is focused on implementation and organisation and a bit of input with content strategy, so a minimum 3+ years experience with social media is neccesary. You’ll be working directly with the founder to help bring ideas to life quickly and consistently.



Role and Responsibilities:

This role is fluid. Different periods of the business will require different focuses — from content to ads to operations. You’ll be expected to adapt quickly and execute where needed.



CONTENT EXECUTION:

- Upload and schedule Instagram + TikTok content

- Write captions based on rough notes, voice notes, or direction,

- Repurpose content (reels ? carousels ? captions ?
s)

- Post and manage Instagram stories

- Research content ideas and viral trends on social media

- Organise content folders (Google Drive / Dropbox)

- Content Coordination

- Work directly with our video editor for ideation/briefs/scripts + content delivery 

- Ensure content is ready and scheduled on time

- Request revisions and manage feedback loops

- Maintain a clear content pipeline (what’s done, what’s next)



ADS SUPPORT: (Execution of tasks only - Founder will guide you on strategy & how to do this) 

- Upload creatives into Meta Ads Manager

- Duplicate campaigns/ad sets and follow naming conventions

- Organise and create ad creatives on Canva (hooks, angles, winners)

- Pull basic performance metrics (CPL, leads, spend)



MARKETING & OPERATIONS:

- Upload and format landing pages in GoHighLevel 

- Manage basic
 follow-ups 

- Create landing pages and sales carts

- Create and set up funnels for digital products based on detailed instructions and ideas the founder has 

- Help execute the business ideas the founder has 

- Keep systems, folders, and client assets organised

- Assist with reporting and tracking performance

- Setting up automated workflows,
 triggers, and lead management to ensure no lead falls through the cracks.



EA/ADMIN:

- Own and execute day-to-day tasks end-to-end 

- Manage inbox, follow-ups, and communication with the founder to keep everything moving

- Draft proposals for prospective clients

- Build and maintain systems to improve efficiency and reduce manual work

- Send out invoices + contracts

- Identify bottlenecks and proactively solve them before they slow down the business





Ideal Skills + Experience

- Minimum 3+ years of experience in a marketing, social media/content and have experience in admin work. (You must have experience in social media NOT just admin)



- Experience of:

- Managing, creating & scheduling content on Instagram and/or TikTok

- Working in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines

- Executing tasks quickly and accurately (not just planning)

- Creating automations and
 campaigns



Experience using most of these tools:

- Canva

- Meta Ads Manager (preferred but not required)

- Google Suite

- Trello (Optional) 

- Zapier 

- Miro (Optional)

- GoHighLevel or a similar CRM 

- Capcut



OTHER SKILLS:

- Highly organised and detail-oriented 

- Building funnels/landing pages

- Strong written English (for captions +
s)

- Fast executor - you get things done without overthinking and needing to be micromanaged 

- Able to follow instructions and take initiative

- Claude/AI tools 





What to expect:

- Pace of the agency & education/consulting business

- Fast-paced. We move quickly, test ideas, and prioritise execution over perfection.



Hours & Timezone

This is a full time role but can be part time to start and slowly transition into full time within 90 days but must eventually be FT so please do not apply if you can not work full time.

Must be able to work within or overlap with AEST (Sydney time).



Support

- You’ll work directly with the founder with clear direction, briefs, and systems in place. You won’t be left guessing what to do and you will be able to upskill. 

- Great work culture and flexibility 

- Small of 3, lean team focused on output and results. No corporate layers, no unnecessary meetings, we prefer as few meetings as possible and just letting you execute the tasks!



Growth opportunity

- As the business grows, there’s opportunity to take on more responsibility and move into a higher-level role and manage people.

- Perks & Benefits

- 14 days paid annual leave per year after working for a minimum of 8 months

- Australian public holidays observed

- Option to take up to 3 Philippines public holidays of your choice

- Performance-based bonuses based on output and consistency

- Professional Development: We are big on professional development, and you’ll be coached by the founder and have access to upskilling when required.





How to Apply?

Please do the following below and share with 



TO APPLY:

- Tell me why you're good fit for this job in no more than 4-5 sentences to the above

- Must fill out this JotForm application - LINK: 

- (OPTIONAL but preferred) Share an example of content or work you’ve previously executed that you’re proud of. You can attach any links/files to 
 or send a screen recording on Loom.

- Send me your CV with your portfolio with the SUBJECT LINE & secret word “Blueberries” followed by your name





Any applications without the secret word and have not completed the JotForm will not be considered for the role.

title: Operations & Fulfilment Coordinator
description:
GCB is a Queensland-based windows and doors business going through an exciting transformation. After six years as a family business, we're building out a fully professional team with new systems and clear processes. This is a ground-floor opportunity to own a critical role as we scale.



About the Role



Once the sales team closes a deal, it lands with you. You are the engine that makes sure every order is fulfilled accurately, every customer is kept in the loop, and every delivery happens on time — and only after payment is received.



Your core responsibilities:



• Generate invoices and confirm deposits are received before any order is placed

• Triple-check every order (colour, size, specifications) with the customer before sending to the manufacturer — you are the last line of defence against costly errors

• Prepare and send orders to the manufacturer with complete accuracy

• Proactively update customers on order status — they should never need to call wondering what's happening

• Handle customer calls and complaints professionally, set clear expectations, and follow through on every resolution

• Ensure completion payments are received before any delivery is dispatched

• Coordinate with the warehouse manager on incoming deliveries and delivery scheduling

• Log and maintain all activity in Zoho CRM — accurate records are non-negotiable

• Support the sales team during high-volume periods to help prepare quotes (secondary responsibility)



Systems you'll use:



• Zoho CRM — daily hub for order tracking and customer communications

• Zoho Quoting — for reviewing and supporting quote preparation

• Xero — for invoicing and tracking payments



What We're Looking For



• Proven background in operations, order management, or customer service coordination

• Exceptional attention to detail — this is the #1 requirement

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

• Comfortable managing unhappy customers and resolving issues calmly

• Proactive mindset — you spot problems before the customer does

• Reliable, organised, and self-managing

• Available 8am–4pm AEST, Monday–Friday + occasional Saturdays



Role Details:



• Full-time, 8 hours/day

• Fully remote

• Queensland business hours: 8am–4pm AEST



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU if you:



• Have a system for everything and never let things fall through the cracks

• Take pride in being proactive — customers never need to chase you because you've already reached out

• Stay calm and professional when a customer is unhappy and turn complaints into positive outcomes

• Have high attention to detail — you triple-check things before sending because you know the cost of getting it wrong

• Thrive in a growing, fast-moving business where you can genuinely shape how things are done



DO NOT APPLY if you:



• Need to be constantly told what to do or chased for updates

• Get flustered when customers are upset or frustrated

• Are sloppy with details — wrong measurements, wrong colours, wrong specs cost real money

• Have never used a CRM or don't know what Xero is

• Are looking for a relaxed, low-accountability role

• Can't commit to 8am–4pm Queensland time (AEST), Monday–Friday (and occasional Saturdays)



How to Apply — MUST complete all three:



Tell us about a time you caught an error before it became a problem — what happened and what did you do?



Describe how you manage multiple tasks or active orders at once — what system do you use?



Complete this DISC personality assessment (~10 mins) and send a screenshot of your pie chart:

???? https://www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Content and Media Operator
description:
We are hiring a Content and Media Operator to help keep our marketing consistent and moving.



This role is responsible for taking raw footage, photos, ideas, and content direction and turning them into clean, organized, on brand content that gets edited, scheduled, and published on time.



This is not a creative director role.

This is not a strategy only role.



This is an execution role for someone who is fast, organized, dependable, and strong at following through.



If you are the type to wait around for constant reminders or need heavy hand holding to get things done, this is not the role for you.



Primary Objective

Make sure content never goes silent by consistently editing, organizing, scheduling, and preparing content across platforms.



Key Responsibilities

• Edit raw video into short form content optimized for engagement and retention

• Repurpose one piece of content into multiple platform ready assets

• Edit and format photos for social posts, covers, thumbnails, carousels, and promo content

• Add captions, text overlays, simple branding, and clean visual formatting

• Organize raw footage, finished assets, folders, and content libraries properly

• Maintain and follow a content calendar

• Prepare content for posting and scheduling across platforms

• Deliver content on time without needing repeated follow up

• Communicate clearly with the team when something is missing, delayed, or needs clarification



What We Need From You

• Strong video editing ability

• Basic photo editing and content design ability

• Good eye for clean formatting and visual presentation

• Strong organization and file management

• Ability to follow direction and still make smart execution decisions

• Consistent communication

• Speed, reliability, and respect for deadlines



Preferred Experience

• Experience editing short form content for social media

• Familiarity with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools

• Experience working with content calendars and scheduled posting

• Experience supporting a brand, business, or personal brand with ongoing content production



Who This Role Is Best For

This role is best for someone who enjoys production and execution.

You do not need to be the mastermind behind the brand.

You do need to be someone who can take direction, move fast, stay organized, and help us keep content flowing consistently.



Creativity matters.

Consistency, speed, and follow through matter more.



Performance Expectations

• Content is delivered on schedule

• Edits are clean and need minimal revisions

• Files and assets stay organized

• Communication is clear and timely

• Posting and content preparation stay consistent

• Marketing stays active instead of going quiet for days or weeks



Work Details

• Remote position

• Part time or full time

• Flexible schedule, but deadlines must be respected

• Starting at $5 per hour

• Around 25 hours per week to start, with room to grow for the right person



Application Instructions

To apply, send:

• Links to your previous work

• A short message introducing yourself

• The tools you use for video editing and photo editing

• Any experience you have with scheduling or posting content

• The word “consistent” in your application so I know you read everything



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: (LOOKING NOW) Social Media Manager & Video Editor (PART-TIME, LONG-TERM)
description:
Generation God is looking for a creative and faith-aligned Content Creator & Social Media Manager to help grow and engage our audience across our social platforms. You’ll lead content execution, manage our brand’s online presence, build our community voice and grow the business through its social pillars.

We’re looking for someone who thrives on creating content that’s real, relatable, viral, and spiritually rooted. If you find joy in seeing your work make an impact, both in results and in meaning, and you have a proactive mindset to test ideas and bring concepts to life, we want you on the team.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Social Media Management & Posting

- Manage our TikTok and Instagram daily

- Post organic content consistently. Reels, TikToks, stories, carousels, static posts.

- Respond to comments, DMs, story replies, and tagged posts

- Repost UGC and customer content that fits our brand

- Keep all channels active and on brand



2. Content Editing & Creation

- Edit short-form video content for TikTok and Reels (viral, organic style)

- Create branded graphics and story content in Canva

- Edit and reformat influencer and UGC content for reposting

- Primary tools: CapCut and Canva



3. Content Strategy & Planning

- Plan and manage a content calendar with the founder

- Research trends (sounds, formats, hooks, topics) and bring ideas regularly

- Track performance and put together bi-weekly reports

- Stay across what's working for DTC and fashion brands on TikTok and Instagram



4. Paid Ad Creative Support

- Reformat existing video assets into ad variations for Meta 
 + Instagram)

- Deliver ad creatives on time in coordination with the founder or ad manager

- Understand the basics of direct-response ads. Hooks, pain points, social proof, CTAs.



5. Brand & Community

- Know our brand voice, aesthetic, and mission inside out

- Make sure everything we post feels authentic and on brand

- Suggest ideas to grow engagement and followers organically



This Role is NOT For You If:

- You want to post and log off. We need someone who cares about what they put out.

- You need hand-holding for every task. We want initiative.

- You see this as just another VA gig. We need someone who gets the mission.



Who We're Looking For:

Character and taste matter more than a long resume. We'd rather someone with a sharp eye for what works and the drive to prove it than someone with years of corporate social media experience.



- You're plugged into TikTok and Instagram. You know what's trending and why it works.

- You know how to edit short form content via Capcut

- You have a good eye for aesthetics and what feels on brand

- You're results oriented. You care about what performs, not just what looks nice.

- You're proactive. You bring ideas, not just wait for instructions.

- You've worked with Meta ad creatives before, or you're willing to learn fast

- Comfortable working async with someone in an Australian timezone



Growth:

Starting at 20 to 25 hours per week, with a clear path to full time. If you're the right fit, there's also opportunity to take on work across a second brand we're connected to. We want someone long-term who's building with us.



How to Apply:

Please include:

1. A short video (1-2 min) introducing yourself and why you'd be a good fit

2. Your resume or portfolio with social media and video editing work

3. Links to accounts you've managed (with metrics if possible)

4. 2-3 examples of short-form video you've edited



Let’s build something that matters.

Together.

title: Shopify Developer
description:
Wood&Co. is hiring a Shopify Developer (full-stack / hybrid) to support the build of its ecommerce platform.



We are developing a design-led, made-to-order ecommerce experience with structured product configurations and a strong emphasis on presentation quality. This role involves working closely with the founder and project lead in an iterative, hands-on process, helping translate business logic and product structure into a functional Shopify storefront.



Key Responsibilities

     - Develop and customize a Shopify storefront based on defined requirements

     - Set up and organize product data, including attributes, variants, and metafields

     - Implement product option logic and pricing behavior based on defined rules

     - Build and refine product page layouts using custom sections or templates

     - Ensure consistent application of brand guidelines across the site

     - Support product data uploads and ongoing updates

     - Evaluate and integrate third-party apps or custom solutions where needed

     - Ensure the site functions properly across desktop, tablet, and mobile

     - Participate in working sessions and contribute to implementation decisions



Qualifications

     - Solid experience building and customizing Shopify stores (Liquid, themes, sections)

     - Comfortable working as a hybrid developer (handling both development and layout execution)



Experience with:

     - Complex product setups (multiple options, configurations)

     - Pricing adjustments based on selections or conditions

     - Metafields and structured product information

     - Managing product data via CSV or similar workflows

     - Customizing product detail pages beyond default templates



You should be able to:

     - Work with pre-defined systems and translate them into implementation

     - Think through edge cases and suggest practical solutions

     - Maintain clean structure in both code and layout

     - Apply visual guidelines with attention to spacing and hierarchy

     - Communicate clearly and work collaboratively



Engagement Details

     - Hiring ASAP

     - Engagement: full-time or near full-time equivalent

     - Flexible hours, with availability for ongoing coordination

     - Work will be structured around milestones and iterative delivery



Application Instructions

Please submit your application in a Google Drive folder (sent via link). Include the following:

     1. Your CV

     2. A 1–2 minute intro video covering: (a) Your background with Shopify; (b) A project where you handled product configuration or pricing logic; (c) How you approach more complex builds; and (d) Why this role interests you

     3. A Google Doc containing:

     - Links to Shopify stores you’ve worked on, with a brief explanation of your role in each

     - Short answers to: (a) Your experience with product variants or configuration logic; (b) Your experience working with product data (metafields, bulk uploads, etc.); and (c) Your experience customizing product pages

     - Your availability: Hours per week, time zone, and earliest start date

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Customer Service Rep with E-commerce Experience
description:

---



**ABOUT CLARITY MD**



Clarity MD is a US-based health and wellness company delivering high-quality products and exceptional customer experiences.



**ROLE OVERVIEW**



As our Customer Service Representative, you will be the frontline of communication between Clarity MD, our customers, and our suppliers. You will manage customer inquiries via
, coordinate with suppliers to resolve product issues, handle refund and damaged goods claims, and keep the team informed through regular reporting. This role is 25–30 hours per week, Monday through Friday, ideal for a self-starter who thrives in a fast-paced environment.

- Proven experience in customer service within an e-commerce environment (direct response health/supplement brand preferred)

- Proficiency with
 platforms, CRM tools, and basic reporting (Google Sheets, Commslayer)

**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**



Customer Communication

- Respond to customer
s promptly and professionally, addressing inquiries, concerns, and complaints

- Maintain a friendly, solution-oriented tone in all communications

- Track and follow up on open customer issues to ensure timely resolution



Supplier Coordination

- Communicate directly with suppliers to escalate and resolve product issues on behalf of customers

- Stay on top of supplier responses — follow up persistently until problems are fully resolved

- Coordinate refunds and replacements for damaged or defective goods

- Ensure Clarity MD is properly refunded or credited for damaged inventory



Reporting

Team Collaboration

etings per week

- Collaborate with tea
mbers to improve the overall customer experience



**WHAT WE OFFER**



- Flexible, remote work schedule (Monday – Friday)

- A supportive and collaborative team environment

- Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving company in the health and wellness space

- Hands-on experience across customer service, supplier management, and operations



**HOW TO APPLY**



If you're a proactive communicator who takes ownership of problems and sees them through to resolution, we'd love to hear from you. Please send your resume and a brief cover letter explaining why you're a great fit for this role.



*Clarity MD is an equal opportunity employer.*

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience



To apply: Please submit your application through the provided link below:

- Share 3 videos you've edited, not a portfolio page, just 3 specific links. For each one, write one sentence on why you're proud of it.

- Watch this video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bamjMX35cpjt3qHoT8pEnfRIupRShGto/view?usp=sharing and tell us what you would change about the editing and why.

- Start your application message with the phrase "I'm ready!"



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Video Editor for High-Performance Meta Ads
description:

Who We're Looking For

Growth Path:

If you want to develop into a marketer and not just stay behind the timeline, this is the place to do it.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor (with Social Media Skills)
description:
We’re Firestarter—a fast-growing international creative company helping entrepreneurs and experts build high-caliber brands. Through our creative agency, coaching programs, and digital platforms, we combine strategy, design, and tech to empower leaders to step into their next-level vision. We’re hiring a full-time Graphic & Video Designer to join our team!



As our Graphic & Video Designer, you’ll work closely with our CEO/Creative Director and our Design & Brand Experience Lead to support both company brand presence and client projects. We have a lot of internal graphic design and other creative production needs sitting in the pipeline, and are excited for you to jump in and start working closely with our team. 



Responsibilities

- Graphic Design & Animation: Create professional graphics and branded assets using Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), and other tools, including animated graphics. 

- Video Editing: Edit engaging videos for social media, podcasts, and YouTube (Premiere Pro, CapCut)

- Podcast Editing: Edit audio and video for company podcast

- Social Media Branding: Develop brand-aligned social assets, templates, and graphics.

- Website Updates: Keep websites fresh by interfacing with our development team to add new testimonials, client stories, and assets.

- Figma: Use for collaboration, mockups, and design workflows.



Preferred (but not required): GoHighLevel & funnel design experience for alignment with our digital platform work.



You’re a Great Fit If You…

 • Are highly creative with a sharp eye for branding and visual storytelling.

 • Have proven experience in both design and video editing.

 • Are detail-oriented, organized, and thrive in a remote, collaborative environment.

 • Can juggle priorities and move efficiently through varied daily, monthly, and weekly creative team needs. 

 • Are proactive, resourceful, a good team player and communicator, and willing to learn new tools.



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio showcasing graphic design and video editing work.

 • Proven experience with: Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, Premiere Pro, CapCut, Figma.

 • Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup. Our team communicates via Slack & Zoom. 

 • Excellent written and spoken English communication skills. Comfortable on camera meeting with team & clients. 

 • Ability to work US hours - ideally Eastern Time 9am-5pm ET



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

 • GoHighLevel platform familiarity (we run our company on GoHighLevel and have a white label SaaS for clients)

 • Funnel design experience.



What We Offer

 • Full-time, long-term role with a fast-growing international creative company.

 • Work-from-home flexibility.

 • Professional growth opportunities, including optional GoHighLevel certification training.

 • A supportive, collaborative team environment where your creativity and ideas are valued.

 • Competitive salary (to be discussed based on experience).



Learn more about us:

mbers across strategy, design, and marketing

Required

title: Xactimate Insurance Supplement Specialist (Roofing | Part-Time | Per Job Pay)
description:
We are a growing roofing and exterior company looking for a reliable Xactimate estimator to assist with insurance claims on a part-time basis.



You will be responsible for reviewing insurance scopes, rebuilding estimates when needed, and identifying missing line items to maximize claim value.



This is not a customer-facing role. You will not be speaking with homeowners or insurance adjusters. Your focus is strictly on building accurate, complete estimates and supplement scopes.



We currently have a small volume (around 5 jobs per month) but are looking to grow.



Responsibilities:

Review insurance scope of loss and photos

Rebuild estimates in Xactimate when needed

Identify and add missing line items

Prepare supplement-ready estimates

Ensure estimates are clean, organized, and accurate

Turnaround time: 24–48 hours per file



Compensation:

$50 per estimate

Performance bonus: $50–$150 per project based on approved supplements



Strong performance will lead to consistent work and increased volume.



Requirements (Must Have):

Experience using Xactimate (roofing preferred)

Ability to review a scope and identify missing items without needing measurements ordered

Understanding of roofing systems and common insurance omissions

Ability to write clear, professional supplement notes

Strong attention to detail



What We’re Looking For:

We are not looking for someone to simply copy the insurance scope.



We want someone who can:

Catch what others miss

Think through the full scope of the job

Build estimates that put us in a strong position when negotiating with insurance



Application Process:

If you seem like a good fit, we will send a simple test project to evaluate your ability to review a scope and Identify missing items. And then Build a clean estimate



This is the most important step in our hiring process.



How to Apply:



Please include:

Your experience with Xactimate

Types of projects you’ve worked on (roofing, siding, etc.)

A brief explanation of how you identify missing items in an insurance scope



Final Note:

We value accuracy, speed, and the ability to think critically through a project. If you’re detail-oriented and take pride in your work, this will be a great fit.

title: Creative Performance Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a mid-to-senior Creative Performance Strategist to own and scale performance creative across paid social and video channels. This is a fully remote role aligned with U.S. business hours (Pacific Time Zone), where you’ll operate as a core member of our growth team, driving creative strategy that directly impacts revenue.



This role sits at the intersection of creative thinking, data, and performance marketing. You won’t just launch ads—you’ll design frameworks, hooks, and messaging that consistently produce scalable direct response results. You’ll collaborate closely with creators, editors, and media buyers to develop, test, and optimize creative that drives CAC efficiency, CTR, ROAS, and overall revenue growth.



What You’ll Own

• Lead creative strategy for paid acquisition across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and emerging channels

• Develop performance-driven hooks, angles, messaging frameworks, and concepts rooted in data and social commerce insights

• Build and manage a structured creative testing system with weekly roadmaps, clear hypotheses, and scaling logic

• Analyze performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, CPA, ROAS) to inform creative direction

• Break down creative performance at the hook, first 3 seconds, body, and CTA to identify optimization opportunities

• Research competitor, creator, and platform trends to identify winning formats and whitespace opportunities

• Write actionable creative briefs for editors and creators and guide production to ensure content converts

• Partner with media buying to align creative strategy with account structure, bids, and scaling decisions

• Systemize learnings through naming conventions, testing logs, and performance frameworks for compounding insights



What We’re Looking For

• 4–6 years of experience in creative strategy, performance marketing, or growth marketing

• Proven track record developing direct response creative for TikTok and Meta

• Deep understanding of creator-style content and social commerce

• Strong analytical skills and ability to translate data into actionable creative insights

• Experience working with creators, editors, and media buyers

• Ability to build and execute structured creative testing frameworks

• Bonus: Experience in beauty, skincare, or lifestyle DTC brands, TikTok Shop, or scaling paid social creative at meaningful spend



Why This Role

This is an opportunity to help build a best-in-class performance creative engine from anywhere in the Philippines. You’ll have real ownership and autonomy to create repeatable creative frameworks that drive scalable, profitable growth.







If you're interested, please send a link or copy of your resume.

title: Data Validation Expert
description:
About Fundable



At Fundable, we are building a new-age startup intelligence platform. We combine

advanced web-scraping and LLMs to track VC-backed startups in real-time, sourcing

and extracting key financing details from the latest press releases. Our mission is to

provide the most comprehensive, accurate, and up-to-date data on the startup

ecosystem, offering real-time deal coverage and transparent sourcing as a cost

effective alternative to industry leaders.



Job Description: Data Validator

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data Validator to assist with reviewing, verifying, and

validating data ingested from our pipeline.



This is an integral role for our startup. As an early-stage company, this position offers

the unique opportunity to wear many hats. While your primary focus will be data

validation, you will be encouraged to learn about, and potentially contribute to, other

functions such as sales, growth, or product development based on your interests and

evolving company needs.



Responsibilities

- Review and meticulously verify the accuracy of newly reported funding rounds

and related data.

-- Related data consists of (but not limited to)

-- Investors, Angel Investors, Lead Partners, Valuations, etc

- Research companies to find missing funding rounds

- Validate company slugs (linkedin, x, pitchbook, crunchbase, etc)



Requirements

- Understanding of the Venture Capital (VC) and startup ecosystem.

- General understanding of finance (what is an investor, M&A, IPO, etc.)

title: Delivery Program Operations Associate
description:
At Medley, we empower the next generation of leaders at the world's most iconic companies through transformational group coaching. Our clients are Fortune 500 organizations and other leading enterprises across industries. As a Delivery Associate, you'll play a central role in executing the operations that make our coaching programs run - managing participant communications, tracking program data, coordinating logistics, and ensuring every touchpoint reflects the quality our clients expect.



This role (40 hours per week) is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced, detail-intensive environments and takes pride in polished, client-ready work. You'll work closely with our Delivery Team to support multiple active cohorts simultaneously. You should be someone who doesn't just execute tasks - you anticipate what needs to happen next, flag issues before they escalate, and look for ways to make processes better.



Your regular working hours will be aligned to US Eastern Time (e.g., 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM ET). Additionally, from May through September 2026, you will provide coverage for a series of APAC-timezone workshops that fall during normal business hours in the Philippines.



What You'll Do:



- Manage Participant Communications: Draft, personalize, and send session-related
s to program participants - including attendance follow-ups, goal reminders, session prep materials, and recaps. Tailor communications based on participant data (attendance history, goals, engagement patterns). These
s go directly to senior and executive leaders at major enterprises - every communication must be polished, professional, and on-brand.



- Run Cohort Administration: Track attendance across active cohorts, maintain accurate records, and flag patterns (e.g., repeated absences) for follow-up. Coordinate scheduling, manage cohort Slack channels, and keep internal team members aligned on upcoming sessions and deadlines. Own the operational details that keep programs running smoothly - calendar invites, session materials distribution, coach communications, and status updates.



- Support Data Collection, Analysis, and Reporting: Help build and QA survey instruments for midpoint and endpoint data collection. Review and clean program data, identifying inconsistencies or errors before they reach client-facing materials. Support the creation of midpoint and endpoint presentations that demonstrate program impact to clients.



- Contribute to Client-Facing Materials: Support the creation and formatting of presentation decks, infographics, session guides, and participant worksheets. Ensure all materials are visually consistent, error-free, and ready for client and coach audiences.



- Provide APAC-Timezone Workshop Coverage: Provide operational support for workshops scheduled during APAC business hours (May - September 2026), including logistics coordination, real-time troubleshooting, and post-session follow-up.



- Drive Process Improvement and Automation: Identify inefficiencies in delivery workflows and propose solutions. Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, NotebookLM) to improve communications quality, streamline repetitive tasks, and support data analysis. Contribute to team-wide automation efforts using platforms like Make (Integromat), Slack integrations, and other tools.



- Collaborate Across the Team: Participate in daily standups, weekly cohort reviews, and team planning sessions. Log time

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
About Saltd Studio:

Saltd Studio is a creative branding, web design, and marketing studio that works with small to medium-sized businesses. We specialize in building intentional, beautiful brands and websites for service-based and some product-based business owners, and we help market them long-term. We value great relationships with our clients and team, creative ideas and designs, high standards in quality and client deliverables, and having fun throughout it all. 



We’re looking for a Social Media Content Creator to support with social media content, video editing, and creative marketing support.



Key Responsibilities:

 -Edit short-form video content such as Instagram Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts

 -Create on-brand static and video-based social media content

- Create social media captions 

 -Assist with content brainstorming and marketing ideas

 -Post and schedule content across social media platforms

 -Cross-post content to additional platforms



Qualifications:

 -Strong written English skills

 -Experience editing short-form video content

 -Comfortable with Canva

- Experience staying on-brand within content with a set color palette, logos, fonts, tone of voice, etc. 

 -Experience with additional content editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.) is a plus, but not required

 -Creative thinker who enjoys brainstorming content ideas

 -Detail-oriented and organized

 -Comfortable communicating with our team over Slack and participating in regular Zoom video calls

 -Experience writing short-form video scripts is a plus, but not required

 -Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with content ideation

 -Able to work independently and manage deadlines while keeping us in the loop

 -Comfortable using tools like Google Drive, Dropbox, ClickUp, Slack, etc.



Rate & Benefits:

 $650/month for 40 hours per week (starting rate)

After initial employment trial period, tea
mbers are eligible for the following benefits:

- 10 days of PTO and Sick Leave annually

- Parental leave

- An office supply allowance

- 13th-month pay

- Professional development and courses to support your work skillset

- Paid holidays



How to Respond:

 -Reply to this job posting with a link to your resume and examples of content, social media posts, or design work you have done.

 -Include the phrase “sea salt” in your response. Why? This lets us see who is actually paying attention.

title: Hospice QA Coordinator (Home Health)
description:
DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet the qualifications listed below



Position Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented and service-driven Virtual Hospice Quality Assurance (QA)  to provide after-hours, evening, and weekend support for hospice operations.



This role is primarily responsible for quality assurance, compliance monitoring, and documentation accuracy, while also supporting intake coordination, patient call management, scheduling follow-ups, and EMR documentation.



The ideal candidate has prior hospice or home health experience, strong knowledge of documentation compliance standards, excellent English communication skills, and the ability to remain calm and professional in time-sensitive or sensitive patient situations.



Key Responsibilities

Hospice Quality Assurance (Primary Focus)



• Review and audit patient charts to ensure compliance with hospice regulations and company standards

• Track and follow up on missing, incomplete, or non-compliant documentation

• Ensure timely upload of physician orders, certifications, and required hospice documentation

• Maintain organized QA logs, audit trackers, and electronic records

• Support compliance readiness for internal reviews and external audits

• Flag documentation discrepancies and escalate issues to appropriate leadership



Intake & Documentation Support



• Assist with hospice intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders, certifications, and care plans in EMR

• Monitor and manage endorsement and handoff reports

• Ensure all documentation is complete, accurate, and filed timely



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits for hospice patients

• Coordinate with field clinicians, intake teams, and office staff

• Assist in care coordination and communication workflows

• Escalate urgent clinical or operational concerns as needed



Patient & Call Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient, family, and caregiver calls

• Provide compassionate, professional customer service aligned with hospice care standards

• Accurately document all interactions in EMR

• Route concerns promptly and appropriately



Qualifications & Requirements

Required



• Prior healthcare experience (hospice or home health strongly preferred)

• Experience with medical documentation review, QA, or compliance tracking

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

• High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

• Strong computer proficiency (Microsoft Office, spreadsheets, EMR systems)

• Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time)

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional remote workspace



Preferred



• Direct Hospice QA or compliance experience

• Experience with Home Health/Hospice EMR systems (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)

• Clinical background (RN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health)

• Familiarity with hospice regulations and documentation standards



How to Apply



Please submit a short cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and include your answers to the questions below:



Describe your experience in hospice or home health, including your role, duration, and responsibilities.



Do you have experience with quality assurance, chart audits, or compliance tracking? Please explain.



How many years of experience do you have in Hospice or Home Health?



What EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)?



Describe your experience reviewing or managing medical documentation (orders, certifications, care plans, etc.).

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
We're looking for a reliable short-form video editor to join our team on a part-time basis, with a clear path to full-time as volume increases. You'll be editing vertical (9:16) videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

This is a straightforward editing role — all assets will be provided to you. You are assembling, not creating from scratch.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing short-form vertical videos (30–90 seconds) from pre-recorded A-roll (talking head footage) and pre-made B-roll (AI-generated images and video clips)

Cleaning up A-roll: trimming dead air, removing filler words, tightening pacing

Cutting B-roll into the timeline to match the script and visual flow

Adding smooth transitions between A-roll and B-roll

Adding animated captions/subtitles (style reference will be provided)

Adding background music and sound effects where appropriate

Color correcting A-roll for a clean, consistent look

Exporting final videos optimized for each platform



What We Provide



Finished A-roll footage (talking head)

All B-roll assets (AI-generated images and short video clips)

Scripts so you know what's being said and when B-roll should appear

Reference/example videos showing the exact style and pacing we want

Music and sound effect libraries or direction on sourcing



What We're Looking For



Proven experience editing short-form vertical content (show us your work)

Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Ability to add clean, on-brand animated captions (CapCut auto-captions or similar)

Good sense of pacing and timing — you understand how short-form content flows

Strong attention to detail

Reliable communication and consistent turnaround times

Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly



Nice to Have



Experience editing content in the AI, tech, or creator education space

Familiarity with trending short-form editing styles on TikTok and Instagram

Basic color correction skills

Experience with audio cleanup (noise removal, volume leveling)



Details



Part-time to start (3–5 videos per week), with a path to full-time based on performance and volume

Compensation is per-video and will be discussed after the test edit

Long-term communication and workflow will be managed through Slack



How to Apply



Send your portfolio or links to short-form videos you've edited. We'll select a few candidates for a paid test edit using our actual assets and reference videos before making a final decision.

title: Personal Executive Assistant
description:
***READ FULL JOB POST BEFORE APPLYING. *** Please don't waste your time or mine. Thanks :)



Flexible schedule. Long-term opportunity.



Looking for:

- Outstanding English

- Strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive behavior 

- Great on the phone



ABOUT ME

Hi! My name is Danny. 



I built the largest salsa and bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and have a very ambitious business path ahead. 



On this journey I'm looking for a super strong, reliable, capable "right-hand person," to be my trusted executive assistant. 



I've hired approximately 100 people internationally in the past decade, so I have plenty of experience working with people abroad. Looking for someone great!





SCHEDULE



Flexible! Time of day you work is usually very flexible but there are a couple of guidelines:

- Speed matters. Turnaround times should be maximum 24 hours. Same day is better. When possible, right away is even better. 

- Requests may come 7 days per week. I will always aim to be relaxed with timelines when possible, but some things may be time sensitive

- Occasionally you'll be on the phone, which will require being available during business hours PST (Los Angeles time)



Estimating 10-30 hours per week for now, fluctuating randomly, so keeping another job at the same time, which also has flexible hours, would likely be a good idea.



Integrity matters - don't do work for me while you're on the clock for your other employer. Make sure you can provide clear separation for them. 



EXAMPLES OF ACTIVITIES:



Most activities will be personal in nature. This is different from a role in the company. 



- Research
