title: Experienced Cold Caller / Appointment Setter Needed for Digital Marketing Services
description:
We are an outbound lead generation agency that helps digital marketing agencies connect with home improvement businesses (plumbing, pest control, roofing, and similar companies) who will benefit from the marketing help (SEO, Google Maps Ranking, Google Ads, Google Business Profile Optimization, etc.)



We are looking for a highly disciplined cold caller (aka. appointment setter) who enjoys speaking with business owners and booking qualified meetings.



You will not be working alone. You will be part of a structured calling system with scripts, materials, and ongoing support from experienced callers and the founder.



Your primary responsibility will be to contact business owners and determine whether they are open to taking on new jobs, then schedule appointments for our clients.



This is a long-term role with opportunities to grow into positions such as:

- Cold Calling Team Manager

- High-Ticket Sales Representative

- Internal Sales Coach

& others



If you are consistent, coachable, and enjoy outbound communication, this role can become a stable long-term opportunity.



1) What Makes This Role Different?



Unlike typical freelance calling roles, you will work inside a structured system with real support.



You will receive:

- Proven scripts and calling frameworks

- Structured training on the system (from multi 4-figure business coaching & courses)

- Live feedback and call reviews

- Weekly team calls

- Mindset training (for continuous growth & support)

- A supportive team of other callers

- Direct guidance from the founder



Your job is execution. The strategy, systems, and materials are already prepared.



2) Who You Will Be Calling?



You will contact home improvement contractors, including:

- Plumbing companies

- Pest control companies

- Roofing companies

- Similar residential service businesses



Your goal is to determine whether they have the capacity to take on additional jobs and schedule a meeting with our client if appropriate.



3) Your Responsibilities



Your work will include:

- Calling business owners using a provided lead list

- Following the provided scripts and frameworks

- Qualifying prospects based on simple criteria

- Booking appointments for our clients

- Logging calls and outcomes in the tracking sheet

- Participating in team feedback sessions



Tools you will use include:

- GoHighLevel

- Google Sheets

- Notion

- Google Workspace tools



4) Requirements



- Strong English proficiency with minimal accent

- Comfortable speaking with business owners

- Consistent work ethic and reliability

- Ability to follow structured processes

- Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience



5) Preferred (But Not Required)



- Located in a United States time zone

- Experience calling local service businesses

- Familiarity with CRM tools



6) Work Structure



Part-time to start.

Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance.

Work alongside a team of other callers.

Regular team communication and support.



7) Personal Traits We Value



We are looking for someone who is:

- Consistent in their work habits

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Calm and confident on the phone

- Professional when speaking with business owners



Cold calling is a skill that improves with discipline and repetition.

We value people who are committed to mastering the craft.



To confirm you have read this description, include the number 77 in your application.

title: Controller
description:
Looking for someone with Controller and FP&A experience



The Controller will be a pivotal senior finance leader, responsible for overseeing all accounting operations, ensuring the integrity of financial data, and providing strategic financial insights to management. This role demands a strong understanding of the staffing industry's unique financial dynamics, including payroll complexities and cost allocation, to support continued growth and operational efficiency.



Essential Duties and Responsibilities

Financial Reporting & General Ledger: Oversee the month-end and year-end close processes and the preparation of accurate, timely internal and external financial statements, ensuring compliance with Generally Accepted Accounting Principles (GAAP).

Budgeting & Forecasting: Manage the annual budgeting and forecasting processes, including cash flow analysis and variance reporting, to help department heads and executives make informed strategic decisions.

Compliance & Audits: Develop, implement, and monitor robust internal controls to safeguard company assets and ensure compliance with all federal, state, and local tax laws and regulations. Coordinate all internal and external audit activities.

title: Mortgage Loan Support Specialist
description:
We are a fast-paced U.S. mortgage brokerage seeking an experienced Loan Support Specialist to assist with file management, document collection, and third-party coordination.

This is a behind-the-scenes, execution-focused role for someone who already understands mortgage files and can step in immediately without needing basic training.

Immediate Start Preferred

Active pipeline is in place and ready for support. We are looking for someone who can step in quickly and begin working on active loan files right away.

Responsibilities

Review loan applications (1003) for completeness

Identify and track missing documents and conditions

Send document request
s using templates

Upload, label, and organize documents in LOS (Arive or similar)

Stack and structure files correctly (income, assets, credit, etc.)

Audit files daily and flag missing or outdated items

Order and follow up on:

VOEs (Verification of Employment)

VORs (Verification of Rent)

VOMs (Verification of Mortgage)

Payoffs and other third-party documentation

Contact employers, landlords, and third parties to obtain required documentation

Maintain clean, organized, and up-to-date loan files at all times

Provide clear file notes and status updates internally

Assist with CRM updates and task tracking (GoHighLevel or similar)

Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

MUST have prior U.S. mortgage experience

MUST have hands-on experience reviewing and organizing loan files

MUST have experience working inside a Loan Origination System (LOS)

Experience with Arive is strongly preferred

Must understand standard mortgage documents (income, assets, credit, etc.) without training

Must be able to identify missing items in a file immediately

Strong attention to detail and organization

Able to work independently without constant supervision

Comfortable making outbound calls to third parties (NOT clients)

Important

This is NOT a client-facing role

No communication with borrowers, agents, or realtors

All communication will be internal or with third parties only

This role requires prior mortgage experience.

If you do not have direct experience working with U.S. mortgage files and reviewing loan documents, please do not apply.

Work Environment

Work will be completed using our shared admin
 and internal systems

Application Requirements (Required to be Considered)

About This Role

This is not a training position.

We are looking for someone who can step in, take ownership of file organization, and immediately support an active pipeline.

title: SEO & AI Search Specialist (GEO/AEO)
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this role feels like the perfect fit and you meet the qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagyn70NlQQGtKUtK/form



Note: Only applications submitted via the above link will be considered.



---

We’re hiring an SEO & AI Search Specialist to grow organic visibility and revenue across traditional search and AI-driven answer engines. You’ll own strategy and execution for our Shopify stores—
 and 
—covering technical SEO, content, entity/structured data, link acquisition, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)—earning inclusion and citations in Google AI Overviews, Bing Copilot, Perplexity, and ChatGPT/Gemini.



You’re excited because you will...



Strategy & Ownership

- Build and execute an integrated SEO + GEO roadmap tied to revenue for priority categories (sheet sets, duvet covers, quilts, decorative pillows).

- Define and track a query set for SERPs and AI answers; report share-of-voice and citation/inclusion rate in AI Overviews/answer engines.



On-Site & Technical

- Audit and improve site architecture, internal linking, faceted navigation, canonicals, and crawl budget for Shopify.

- Elevate Core Web Vitals and image optimization for PDPs/PLPs.

- Implement and maintain JSON-LD schema (Product, Offer, Review, Breadcrumb, Organization, FAQ, ImageObject) to strengthen entity understanding.



Content & Entity Building

- Create entity-first, evidence-backed content answer engines trust: buyer’s guides, comparisons, FAQs, care/how-to, sizing explainers, collection hubs.

- Ensure product attribute completeness (materials, thread count, fill, sizes, care, style) so AI systems can recommend or cite our pages.

- Collaborate with brand/editorial to publish on-brand copy optimized for humans and LLMs.



GEO-Specific Initiatives

- Test AI Overview/answer inclusion tactics (structured data, Q&A blocks, citations, author/entity pages, first-party images).

- Monitor and improve brand citation rate in answers for commercial and informational intents.

- Manage AI crawler permissions and robots directives (GPTBot, Perplexity, CommonCrawl) with Engineering/IT.



Off-Site & Authority

- Build a white-hat digital PR/backlink program with home & design publications, blogs, and partner sites.

- Strengthen E-E-A-T signals (author bios, brand story, policies, reviews/UGC, press mentions).



Analytics & Experimentation

- Run experiments; measure impact in GA4 & GSC with dashboards (Looker Studio).

- Prepare periodic reports and present insights and next steps to stakeholders.



90-Day Success

- Baseline audits completed (technical, content, entities, AI answer presence) and a prioritized 6-month roadmap delivered.

- Quick wins shipped: schema fixes, internal linking improvements, attribute completeness for top SKUs/collections, and one entity-driven content hub launched.

- GEO scorecard established (priority queries, inclusion/citation rate, answer snippets captured, supporting pages).



6–12 Month Outcomes

- Material growth in non-brand organic revenue and category rankings.

- Sustained inclusion/citation in AI answers for target queries across core categories.

- Repeatable GEO playbook embedded in content and merchandising workflows.



Job Requirements

- Proven SEO chops in eCommerce (preferably Shopify) with measurable revenue impact.

- Hands-on GEO experience (or a strong POV) optimizing for AI Overviews and answer engines: structuring content for direct answers, citations, and entity confidence.

- Proficiency with Ahrefs/Similar, Google Search Console, GA4, and Shopify; comfort with HTML/Liquid basics and JSON-LD.

- Ability to plan and execute on-brand digital PR/backlink programs.

- Strong analytical skills; can turn data into decisions and roadmaps.

- Excellent English writing/editing skills (you can own outreach and on-site copy).

- High ownership, bias to action, and communication via
, Slack, Zoom, and phone.

- Bachelor’s degree (or equivalent experience).

- Belief in our company mission and embodiment of our values.



Nice to have

- Experience with product feeds (Google Merchant Center), reviews/UGC integration, and PDP/PLP template optimization.

- Familiarity with log-file analysis, bot identification, and AI crawler management.

- Comfort building dashboards in Looker Studio or similar.



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding, linens, sheeting, decorative pillows, and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate customers' lives through beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we are committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping, and low order minimums, we have become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



More about us and our brands: 

Learn about our Philippines team:

title: Shopify Store Specialist
description:
HOW TO APPLY

To apply, please fill out the application form: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagwn3KJ9biX7VeNO/form



Given the high volume of applicants, we will not be able to consider applications not submitted through this form. Thank you for your understanding!



POSITION DETAILS: SHOPIFY STORE SPECIALIST



MISSION:

To drive E-commerce sales growth through proactive E-commerce account management, including timely and accurate listing management and optimization, digital storefront optimization, and marketing campaign ideation and execution, with the ultimate goal of creating a thriving and sustainable online business that meets the evolving needs of our diverse customer base.



KEY OUTCOMES:

* Product Setup: Efficiently set up new products on assigned accounts according to agreed-upon listing standards, ensuring a 99.8% upload rate.



* Store Optimization: Within the first 6 months, boost our store's conversion rate to the industry average of 2.0%



* Record Maintenance: Maintain 100?curacy in Airtable record-keeping and weekly KPI report tracking.



* Inventory Feeds: Achieve 99?curacy in inventory feed uploads and maintain timely inventory updates, with no more than one error per quarter; do periodic spot checks of >10 items on each platform per week to verify site accuracy



* MAPP Adherence: Maintain 100% compliance with the company's MAPP; violations resolved within 72 hours



* New Ideas: Implement >2 major new ideas per quarter to improve account performance through a mix of competitor research and the latest Shopify/eCom sales strategies



OTHER REGULAR RESPONSIBILITIES:

* SOP Creation and Maintenance: Update/maintain SOPs that encompass the product setup process, store optimization, and more.



* Performance Analysis and Reporting: Every week, analyze sales and other KPIs to understand site performance, identify areas for improvement, and inform data-driven decision-making. Investigate any unexplained fluctuations and collaborate with customers to resolve issues when necessary.



* Cross-functional Collaboration: Monitor daily order flow and collaborate with internal teams such as Customer Service and Marketing to resolve issues and ensure a seamless and integrated approach to store management.



* Market Research: Keep tabs on competitor strategies to inform listing strategy and overall account strategy.



* Promotions and Discounts: Develop and manage promotional campaigns to drive sales, increase customer retention, and enhance brand visibility.



JOB REQUIREMENTS:

* Organized home office setup, free of noise and distractions, with a dual monitor setup strongly preferred.



* Reliable power and internet connections, with backup systems in place.



* Full-time position, 40 hrs/week minimum, with partial overlapping hours or entirely overlapping hours with US Central time



* 2-3 years of experience with Shopify site maintenance



* 1+ years of experience with Shopify site optimization, including CRO work



* Must have substantial previous Excel experience, including experience working with flat files



* Excellent English skills



* High attention to detail, with the ability to meticulously proofread for spelling and grammar



* Ability and willingness to independently learn new tools, products, or technology and make recommendations on trends to support the business



* Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and professional with the ability to multitask and prioritize workload; ability to work independently with minimal supervision is extremely important



* Ability to work with our team via
, Slack, and
/Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion



* Stable, trustworthy, highly dependable. Ideally, someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



* Commitment to HiEnd Accents' mission and values: 
/3Unr0ub



About HiEnd Accents

HiEnd Accents designs and sells premium bedding and home textiles — quilts, sheets, decorative pillows, duvets, and more — that bring everyday luxury into people's homes. We've been family-owned and operated since 2005, now in our second generation of leadership, and are headquartered in Dallas, Texas.



We serve thousands of retailers, interior designers, department stores, and boutique hotels across the United States through four distinct brands spanning a range of styles and price points. Our growth has been recognized nationally: we've been named to the Inc. 5000 (a prestigious list of America's fastest-growing private companies) two years running, and have received multiple industry awards for product excellence.



We're a company of around 45 people — small enough that every person matters, established enough that you're joining something real and growing.



Discover more at 
.



Why HiEnd Accents?

We're growing our team in the Philippines because we believe in finding the best people regardless of geography — and investing in them for the long term.



As a family-owned company, we don't treat our tea
mbers as interchangeable. We take the time to build real working relationships, we care about your professional development, and we want every person who works with us to leave with stronger skills than when they started. That's a genuine commitment from our leadership, not a line in a job posting.



Learn more about our Philippines team here: Meet the HiEnd Accents Team in the Philippines (
) 



What you can expect:

You'll work directly with our core team in Texas — not through layers of management or a BPO intermediary. Your contributions will be visible, your ideas heard, and your growth supported.



-Compensation & Benefits— Competitive pay benchmarked to PH market rates for skilled roles, not entry-level floors. Paid time off, including vacation days and holidays, plus 13th-month pay.

- Real Career Growth— We're expanding quickly, which means new roles and responsibilities open up regularly. We actively develop our people through mentorship, skill-building, and increasing ownership of projects.

-A Team That Feels Like a Team — We're a close, collaborative group that celebrates wins together. You'll know your teammates by name — including leadership.

Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.

nts and appropriate trends

mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

Posting:

, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

Reporting & Strategy

title: Marketing + Social Media
description:
Type: Part-time to start (20 hrs/week), can grow to full-time



Schedule: Flexible daily hours + one weekly/every other week 1hr meeting during US Mountain Time hours



What this job is: You own our marketing execution. Your job is to generate more booked patients at a lower cost by running and improving google/Meta/Local ads, producing weekly content, and keeping our Wix website updated for offers and SEO. This is not a “post and hope” role. It’s a marketing and creative role with weekly accountability.



What you will do (weekly)

Run our paid ads (Google,
/Instagram, Microsoft/ETC)

Update campaigns, budgets, keywords/audiences, and ad copy

Launch monthly split tests (new offers, hooks, creatives, targeting)

Improve results over time: cost per booked patient

Create and post content (Static you create it yourself, Videos + others content will be provided for editing)

Create and publish weekly social content (posts + short videos)

Maintain our social accounts with consistent, brand-aligned content (shorts from videos provided etc)

Create marketing materials (you design it yourself)

Flyers, promo graphics, patient education visuals, simple videos

Assets used online and inside the office



Update/maintain our Wix website + SEO

Add/update offers, service pages, events, and content

Improve on-page SEO basics (titles, headers, internal links, meta descriptions)



Weekly reporting + meeting

Send a short weekly report before the meeting:

What you changed

What worked / what didn’t

What you’re testing next

New creative shipped this week



Who will thrive in this role

This role is for someone who:

Works without being constantly told what to do (Will give you the goals you need to be capable of knowing how to get there)

Ships creative every week (not “waiting on direction”)

Thinks in experiments and numbers (tests ? results ? next test)

Is consistent and organized (checklists, tracking, follow-through)

Can take feedback fast and improve without ego



Minimum requirements:

You have personally managed Google Ads and Meta 
/Instagram) Ads (not just “assisted”)

You can create your own creatives: Canva (required) + basic video editing (CapCut or similar)

You can write clear marketing copy (hooks, offers, CTAs)

You can edit/update a Wix website and handle basic on-page SEO

You can deliver clean weekly reports (shared Excel sheet) and attend one weekly meeting in Mountain Time



What to submit when applying:

Portfolio link with:

2+ ad creatives you made

6+ social posts you made

2 short videos you made/edited



Two short examples of accounts/campaigns you managed with numbers:

Spend range, goal, what you changed, result (CPL or cost/booked)



Your hourly rate and weekly availability

Confirmation you can attend a weekly meeting in US Mountain Time



How we hire

Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid 2–4 hour skills project (ads + creative).



Pre-interview questions 

What were the last 2 campaigns you personally managed (Google or Other)? Share the goal, what you changed, and the result with numbers.

Share your portfolio link (ads + posts + videos). Which 3 pieces are you most proud of and why?

Describe a test that failed. What did you learn?

Share 1 Wix/Web page you edited/designed.

This is NOT a sales role. Scripts and templates will be provided. You do not need to pitch or persuade — just communicate clearly and consistently.



---



? WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Excellent written English — clear, warm, and professional

• Available to work UK hours (approx. 9am–2pm UK time, Monday to Friday)

• Comfortable using WhatsApp,
, and Google Sheets

• Reliable — you show up every day and complete your tasks

• Proactive — if something is unclear, you try first, then ask

• Previous experience in customer service, admin, or client communications preferred



---



? HOURS & PAY



• 5 hours per day, Monday to Friday (~25 hrs/week)

• $3.00 per hour to start - increase after 4 weeks. 

• Remote — work from home

• Must be available during UK business hours



---



???? HOW TO APPLY



Do not send a generic application.



To apply, send:

1. A short note (3–5 sentences) on why you'd be good at this role

2. Your answer to this task:



???? You have been asked to follow up with a freelancer who was sent details about a project two days ago but hasn't replied. Write a short WhatsApp message to check in. Keep it under 60 words, friendly and professional.



Applications without the task response will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor/Ads Publisher
description:
Hi!



I am Bella, from Platform Marketing. We create effective ads for real estate agents in the United States.



We've been working with our Filipino team since 2019 and now have 25+ amazing Filipino teammates! We we treat everyone fairly, communicate well, pay on time, and make the work both challenging and enjoyable. Many of our tea
mbers have grown with us over the years.



We’re looking for 1 more reliable Filipino teammate to join our PH Ads Team on a full-time basis.



What the role involves:

Video editing: adding licensed music, audio ducking, cutting and arranging clips, animated captions, lower thirds, effects, and sometimes AI-generated hooks

Occasional graphic design: PDFs, logos, logo animations, posters, etc.

Publishing posts on
, Instagram, and YouTube (will train on this)

Uploading videos and helping with some Google/YouTube ads (will train on this)

Creating social media ads for clients (mainly
, plus Instagram and Google) (will train on this)



Requirements:

Experience in video editing and comfort in graphic design

Proficient in English (written)

Comfortable and confident using AI video tools for quick edits or additions to raw footage

Your own computer capable of smooth video editing, plus your own Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects license or subscription

Experience with AI video tools (examples: Grok Imagine, Veo, Seedance, Veo, or similar)

Stable, fast internet connection (share a recent speed test)

Good personal setup for reliable video editing (share your computer specs)



Work Schedule:

40 hours per week (about 8 hours per weekday)

Shift sometime between 2:00 PM – 12:00 Midnight Philippine time

Your schedule should have at least a couple of hours overlapping with our US proofing team (ideally within 8:00 PM – 11:00 AM PH time)



This is a great opportunity if you enjoy creative work, want a long-term role with a supportive team, and like using both traditional tools and new AI technology.



How to Apply:

If this sounds like a good fit for you, please reply with:

1) A short audio or video recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself, your relevant experience, and why you think you’d be a great addition to our team.

2) Recent samples of your video edits AND any AI-enhanced work samples.

3) The AI tools you’re most comfortable using.

4) A recent internet speed test result.

5) Details about your video editing setup (computer specs, etc.) and confirmation that you have your own Adobe Apps licenses



Starting pay is $8/hour, paid weekly or biweekly via PayPal or Wise. We review work and there is potential for increased salaries after 30–60 days based on performance.



To help us quickly spot serious applicants, please use this exact subject line when applying:



“Multimedia Editor Application – [Your Name]”



We review applications carefully and look forward to possibly welcoming you to the Platform Marketing PH Team soon!



Thank you!



Bella

Partner / Co-Owner

Platform Marketing

title: Course Management Director
description:
---



ABOUT THE ROLE



I am a retired physician, course creator, and entrepreneur with two online courses hosted on Thinkific and we are starting a YouTube channel called StartMyPractice. I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA to run my entire content production pipeline — from raw audio recordings and text documents to finished, published course lessons and YouTube videos.



This is a long-term role with real growth potential. I already have an outstanding VA running my nutrition store (Agape Nutrition) on a base salary plus performance bonus. This role follows the same model. If you help grow course revenue to meaningful milestones, your bonus will put you in the top earners on this platform.  I am looking for someone to run this with very little supervision.  If you have to be told what to do, this position is not for you.  My role is provide the course content from an information basis and the rest is up to you to turn that into content.  Typically I will record an audio on Coconotes or another platform and the team with make the content.  A Youtube content expert can be provided if needed. 



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Course production (immediate priority):

- Take existing written content and format it into slide scripts using Canva

- Generate AI voiceover using ElevenLabs or Murf (training provided)

- Sync audio to slides and export finished video lessons

- Upload lessons to Thinkific with proper titles, descriptions, and ordering

- Flag gaps in content and maintain a completion tracker



YouTube and StartMyPractice channel:

- Receive audio recordings I make on my phone (Cocoa Notes)

- Upload audio to transcription tool (Otter.ai or Whisper), clean up the transcript

- Format transcript into a structured script and send for my quick approval

- Build simple branded YouTube thumbnails in Canva

- Upload approved videos to YouTube with title, description, and tags

- Maintain a weekly content calendar



Ongoing support:

- Manage course pages on Thinkific

- Assist with ConvertKit
 newsletter formatting and scheduling

- Repurpose video content into short social media clips or posts

- Handle student access issues and basic course support
s



---



WHAT I AM LOOKING FOR



- Strong written and spoken English

- Experience with Canva (required)

- Familiarity with Thinkific, Teachable, or any course platform (preferred)

- Comfortable learning new tools quickly — ElevenLabs, Otter.ai, YouTube Studio

- Highly organized and able to work independently without micromanagement

- Experience with medical, health, or educational content is a big plus

- Honest, communicative, and proactive — I want someone who flags problems early



---



COMPENSATION



Base salary: Competitive, based on experience (please state your expected rate in your application)



Performance bonus: Quarterly bonus tied to course revenue milestones. This is not a token bonus — it is structured to meaningfully reward your contribution to growth. My current VA earns a bonus that places him in the top 10% of earners on this platform when targets are met.



Hours: 20 hours/week to start, with the expectation of moving to full-time as the business grows.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send:

1. A short introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

2. Any examples of course content, Canva designs, or YouTube work you have done

3. Your expected monthly rate

4. One sentence on why you want a long-term role rather than short-term projects



Applications without all four items will not be reviewed. I am looking for someone who reads carefully and follows instructions — this application process is part of the screening.



I respond quickly and move fast once I find the right person.

title: Senior Client Success Manager
description:
General Summary:

The Senior Client Success Manager is responsible for nurturing strategic client relationships, serving as the client’s primary advocate. This role manages a portfolio of high-value, complex, or multi-location accounts, ensuring alignment with client goals, technology strategy, and the company’s services. In addition, the Senior CSM helps document, create, and continuously improve client-facing processes and internal practices to ensure scalable and consistent client success.



Position Responsibilities: 

• Strategic Client Advisory:

Serve as the trusted advisor for assigned strategic accounts, providing guidance and support to align business goals with IT strategy.



• Strategic Business Reviews:

Lead Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) and technology alignment meetings to track progress and strengthen partnerships.



• Understanding Client Needs and Risk Advisory:

Assess client IT environments and business processes regularly to identify needs. Advise clients on potential IT risks and effective mitigation strategies.



• Account Planning:

Develop Account Plans and Client Roadmaps tailored to client objectives.



• Strategic Partnership with vCIO:

Partner with vCIOs to deliver strategic (business) technology roadmaps and planning.



• Escalation Management:

Act as an escalation point for client satisfaction issues, ensuring timely and effective resolution.



• Process Development:

Document and refine client success management processes, playbooks, and client engagement policies.



• Workflow & Standards Improvement:

Contribute to the continuous improvement of client-facing workflows, templates, and service standards.



• Expectation Management:

Ensure client expectations are clearly set, documented, and aligned with the company’s service deliverables.



• Cross-Functional Collaboration:

Collaborate with Service, Project, and Security teams to ensure proactive service delivery.



• Mentorship:

Mentor and coach other client success managers to ensure department consistency and growth.



• LCI Assessments and Recommendations:

Conduct periodic LCI assessments and provide strategic recommendations for IT improvements, lifecycle refreshes, and roadmap alignment.



• Client Communication:

Ensure consistent and strategic communication with key stakeholders about updates, upcoming changes, and service enhancements.



• Ownership of Client-Specific Top 5 High-Level Processes:

Own the review and maintenance of the top 5 high-level client-specific processes: After-hours communication protocols, computer onboarding, user onboarding, user offboarding, and procurement process and guidelines.



• ConnectWise Manage Oversight:

Maintain accurate strategic account data in ConnectWise Manage, including client company records, executive contacts and user roles, sites, etc.



Skills and Abilities: 

• Strong interpersonal and executive communication skills

• Excellent strategic thinking and problem-solving capabilities

• Process-oriented with a continuous improvement mindset

• Proficient in ConnectWise Manage or similar PSA systems

• Capable of mentoring and coaching junior staff



Qualifications:

• 5+ years of Account Management experience, preferably in an MSP or IT services environment

• Strong process-oriented mindset; able to identify areas for operational improvement

• Deep understanding of IT services, cybersecurity, and client advocacy

• Excellent communication and relationship management skills

• Strong project management and documentation capabilities

title: Service Representative (Fully Remote)
description:
Please Read the Whole Job Description Before Applying.



Meadow is transforming end-of-life care, one of the largest and most overlooked industries in America. In under two years, we became the largest independent funeral home in California and have since expanded to multiple states, with more markets on the way. We’ve earned an 80+ NPS, glowing reviews, and the trust of hundreds of families every month.



We believe great people live everywhere. Our team works across continents and time zones, grounded by shared values: high standards, deep empathy, and a drive to do work that matters.



Why join:

- Remote-first, global team: work from anywhere, be trusted to deliver

- Fair, transparent compensation: competitive pay, benchmarked globally.

- High expectations, high support: we invest in training and growth

- Respect and humanity: no burnout culture, no hero worship

- Real-world impact: your work supports families when it matters most.





About the Role:



We’re hiring Service Representatives to support families from the 
nt a loved one enters our care through the final steps of the cremation process. You’ll play a critical role in ensuring every case is handled with accuracy, compassion, and attention to detail.



In this role, you’ll own key parts of the journey - coordinating transportation, managing documentation, and ensuring ashes are returned safely. You’ll work directly with families and external partners to provide clarity, build trust, and make sure nothing is missed.



This position is ideal for someone who is empathetic, organized, and comfortable in a fast-moving startup environment. We’re in active build mode, and this role offers meaningful growth for someone who is proactive, collaborative, and motivated to support others during an important 
nt in their lives.



What You’ll Do:

- Respond to inbound calls, texts, and
s from families with empathy, clarity, and professionalism.

- Build trust quickly and maintain rapport as you walk families through each step of the process.

- Own key case stages: dispatching transportation, managing paperwork, scheduling cremation, and coordinating ashes return.

- Collaborate with internal teams and external partners to move cases forward without delay.

- Keep systems updated, document clearly, and flag issues before they become blockers.

- Anticipate downstream impacts and work proactively to ensure smooth handoffs between teams.

- Work across HubSpot, Aircall, Slack, GSuite, and our internal case management system.



Requirements & Qualifications:

- 2+ years in customer-facing, operations, or hospitality roles - especially in environments where empathy and execution were equally important.

- Clear, calm communicator who builds trust quickly, whether over the phone,
, or text.

- Strong multitasker - able to move quickly while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail.

- Accountable and proactive: you take ownership, close the loop, and surface issues early.

- Energized by our mission and excited about the opportunity to help shape something new in a category that truly needs it.



Details:

- Remote, 

- Compensation: $5-$7.80/hr USD

- Tools: HubSpot, Aircall, GSuite, Slack, and our case management system

- Schedule

- Full-time, 8-hour shift, consistent schedule

- Days: Monday–Friday, Tuesday–Saturday, or Sunday–Thursday 

- Weekend availability is a plus — one or both weekend days welcome.



Shifts: 

- 8 a.m. - 4 pm PT

- 9 a.m. -5 pm PT

- 11 a.m. - 7 pm PT (preferred)



Why Join Us:

- Fully remote: Work from anywhere

- Benefits: PTO, 10 Paid Holidays, Paid Training

- Global collaboration: Work with teammates around the world.

- Purpose-driven work: Make a real difference during one of life’s most meaningful transitions

- Supportive, growth-minded team: Bring your drive and eagerness to learn; we’ll support you every step of the way

- Team & Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and work closely with a founding team that values respect, collaboration, and building a healthy culture alongside a successful business.





Apply here:

title: B2B Appointment Setter ($200/closed deal + $25/Show-up + Bonuses)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am Jordan! I am looking for 1-2 elite appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for just 1 person to do outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I. and their businesses

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $3-6/hour base (depending on experience).

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- $50-$500 in monthly bonuses. Yup, really!

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B. If you talk about other jobs you will be disqualified as we only want to talk about jobs that relate to the job we are offering.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:

1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) Are you willing to complete a short calling test before being hired:

title: Operations Manager (Client & Project Coordination)
description:
Whetstone Creative Agency is a real estate media and marketing company based in Southern Oregon.



We help real estate agents win more listings, market homes at a higher level, and build a brand that stands out. Our work includes photography, video, drone, and social media content, along with larger video production and commercial projects.



We move fast, hold a high standard, and care about doing things right.



The Role



We’re looking for someone to keep our projects organized, scheduled, and moving forward.



This role is simple to understand, but hard to do well.



You are responsible for making sure nothing falls through the cracks, from scheduling to delivery. You’ll manage client communication, coordinate the team, and ensure every project runs smoothly across multiple moving pieces.



You are not managing people.

You are managing clarity, timelines, and execution.



What You’ll Do



Scheduling is a core part of this role. You will schedule real estate photo and video shoots accurately, coordinate availability across photographers, videographers, and clients, and manage reschedules, cancellations, and changes. You’ll ensure all shoot details are complete and correct before the project begins, and balance speed with accuracy when booking.



You will communicate with clients by sending confirmations, reminders, and updates, setting clear expectations for timelines and deliverables, and responding to messages in a timely and professional manner. You will also handle change requests and communicate updates clearly.



You will track all projects from order to delivery. This includes both high-volume real estate shoots and larger video production and commercial projects. You’ll keep projects moving without delays or confusion and ensure deadlines are clear and met.



You will keep the team aligned by communicating assignments and expectations, making sure everyone knows what’s happening and when, sending reminders when needed, and flagging issues early so they can be solved.



Tools You’ll Use



You’ll work inside Spiro for CRM, scheduling, and delivery, Notion for project tracking and organization, Google Workspace for
, calendar, and documents, and ChatGPT to support communication and workflow efficiency.



What We’re Looking For



You are extremely detail-oriented, a strong communicator who is clear, fast, and professional, and highly organized and proactive. You’re comfortable managing a high volume of moving pieces and able to balance speed with accuracy. You take ownership and follow through.



What Success Looks Like



Shoots are scheduled quickly and correctly. Projects move from order to delivery without friction. Clients do not need to follow up for updates. The team always knows what’s happening. Nothing gets missed.



To Apply



Please apply and answer the following three questions in this exact order. If you do not follow these instructions, you will not be considered for this role. This is a detail-oriented role, and this step matters. (Keep answers to 1 paragraph.



1. Tell us about your experience that would make you a great fit for this role?

2. How are you setup to handle issues like storms, power outages, and natural disasters that can effect your work?

3. You get one free round-trip flight anywhere in the world. Where are you going and why?

title: Sales Executive
description:
About Us:

We are an innovative AI-driven accounting and business automation company helping small businesses streamline operations, save time, and make smarter financial decisions. Our cutting-edge AI solutions are reshaping how businesses handle bookkeeping, reporting, and workflow automation.



Role Overview:

You will be responsible for identifying prospects, building relationships, and converting leads into clients for our AI solutions. This role is perfect for someone who thrives in a fast-paced, tech-driven environment and enjoys helping businesses transform through automation.

title: Go High Level Specialist – Join a Fast-Growing Digital Marketing Agency
description:
Hey there! We're a digital marketing agency in an exciting growth phase, and we're looking for a talented Go High Level (GHL) Specialist to become a key part of our team.



One thing we want to be clear about upfront: we're looking for someone who wants a real home - not another client to add to their roster. If you run your own agency or are juggling multiple clients, this probably isn't the right fit. But if you're looking for a dedicated, full-time role where you can go deep, take ownership, and grow with a company that's going places - keep reading.



We want to be upfront with you: we're a startup moving fast, and this role matters. You won't just be executing tasks - you'll be helping us build the backend foundation that powers our entire client delivery engine. If you love systems, automations, and making things work seamlessly behind the scenes, you'll feel right at home here.



???? Compensation



During your first 90 days: $720 USD/month (paid bi-weekly)



After your 90-day probation: $850 USD/month base



Fully ramped earning potential: $1,050 – $1,350+ USD/month (base + performance bonuses)



???? What You'll Actually Be Doing



1. Client Setup & Deployment



- Set up new GHL client sub-accounts (phone numbers,
 config, domain masking) - templates are already built, so you're not starting from zero

- Import, customize, and deploy funnels, websites, and landing pages using our existing snapshots

- Build and manage automation workflows, triggers, and multi-channel campaigns

- Connect GHL to third-party tools via Zapier or native integrations



2. Ongoing Support & Optimization



- Be our go-to person for troubleshooting backend technical issues

- Proactively improve funnels and workflows to boost performance

- Keep an eye on key metrics and campaign health inside GHL

- Maintain clean system hygiene (custom values/fields) so snapshots always deploy correctly





3. ? What We're Looking For



- 2+ years of hands-on GHL experience - you know the platform inside and out

- You're looking for a full time dedicated role that you can grow in (this isn't for part time work while you do other things)

- A natural problem-solver - a broken trigger is a puzzle to fix, not a reason to panic

- Detail-oriented and process-driven - you double-check every branch before going live

- Strong English communication - comfortable explaining technical stuff clearly over Slack or Loom

- Available during Canadian EST business hours for daily syncs





???? A Note From Us

We're growing fast and building something real. This isn't a point-and-click role - we need someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and genuinely cares about getting things right. In return, you'll have a front-row seat to building a growing agency from the ground up, with room to grow alongside us.



???? How to Apply

We'd love to hear from you! Please apply through the link below - direct messages won't be considered, as all applications go through our screening process to keep things fair: APPLY HERE -->

title: Sales Representative for Pest Control Company | $8/hr + Commission
description:
We’re a fast-growing landscaping and pest control company based in the United States, and we’re building a team that feels like family. We’re tight-knit, supportive, and serious about rewarding people who show up and give their best. You won’t be just another employee here — you’ll be a key part of how we grow.



You’ll be joining two Filipino tea
mbers who are already thriving with us. We’ve got your back from day one.



What You’ll Be Doing



You will be following up with warm inbound leads coming in from social media (no cold calling), having friendly and confident conversations to close deals over the phone, sending quotes and estimates to potential customers, and managing leads and customer info inside GoHighLevel (GHL) and PestRoutes CRM using our Quo phone system.



What We Offer

$8.00 USD per hour base pay, commission on every deal you close. Great closers make $25 + per hour, Full training provided with a proven script, Filipino teammates to work alongside, flexible schedule, and real growth opportunity as we expand fast and promote from within.



What We’re Looking For



Strong spoken English is required as you’ll be speaking with US customers daily. We care more about your attitude than your resume — hunger and heart matter most. You’ll need a reliable internet connection, a quiet workspace, and comfort learning new tools like GHL, PestRoutes, and Quo (all training provided). You should be self-motivated, punctual, and someone who takes ownership and treats customers like they matter.



Schedule



Saturday full-time hours and Monday through Friday or Tuesday through Friday Full time hours, all in Pacific Standard Time (PST). (must be able to work Saturday.) 



How to Apply

Send a short voice recording of 1 to 2 minutes and send us your resume. 



 We respond to every serious applicant.

Requirements:

Important:

 • Follow the workflow exactly

title: Portfolio Analyst — Remote
description:
About Us - Seres Capital Partners 

We're a real estate investment firm based in Chicago managing a multifamily portfolio across the United States. We also operate short-term rental properties. We're growing toward 3,000 units and need someone sharp with numbers to help us get there.



The Role

We need a Portfolio Analyst to own the data and reporting across our multifamily properties. You'll pull numbers from our property management software, build reports, prep scorecards for weekly leadership meetings, and flag anything that looks off. This role works directly with the CFO and asset management team.

If you've worked in real estate, property management, or finance and you're comfortable in spreadsheets and software systems, this is a great fit.



What You'll Do

Pull and review weekly rent rolls across all properties. Flag delinquencies, vacancies, and anything unusual.

Prep scorecard data before our weekly L10 leadership meetings so the team walks in ready.

Pull financial data from AppFolio, Yardi, and Entrata. Organize it into clean, usable reports.

Build monthly variance reports comparing actual expenses to budget. Flag items that are off by more than 10%.

Support the asset management team with ad hoc data requests and analysis.

Track occupancy, collections, and expense trends across the portfolio.

Help build and maintain dashboards so leadership can see portfolio performance at a glance.



What We're Looking For

Experience pulling data from property management software.

Strong Excel and Google Sheets skills. You should be comfortable with formulas and organizing data.

Detail oriented. 

Clear communicator. You'll send reports to the team weekly. They need to be clean and easy to read.

Self starter. We'll train you on our systems, but you should be the type who figures things out without being told every step.

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace.



Nice to Have:

Experience in real estate, property management, or financial analysis.

Familiarity with QuickBooks Online.

Experience working with US-based companies.

Background in bookkeeping or accounting.



Tools You'll Use

AppFolio, Yardi, Entrata, QuickBooks Online, Google Sheets / Excel, Slack or
 for communication.



How to Apply

Send a message with:

A short summary of your relevant experience. 

Any experience with property management software or real estate.

Your expected monthly salary in USD.



Must be available during US Central Time business hours.

Salary: $800 to $1,500/month USD depending on experience

Hours: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM CST Chicago Time

title: Data Privacy
description:
We are a US-based startup (Human Motion Data, Inc.) that collects first-person video and motion data in residential homes for robotics and AI training. We need a Philippine-licensed attorney to review our Home Access, Video, and Data Use Agreement — a ~3,000-word contract between our company and Filipino homeowners who grant us access to their homes for data collection visits.

The agreement covers property access and liability, video/sensor data collection and ownership, data privacy consent under RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012) and its IRR, cross-border data transfer (Philippines ? US), open-source / public release of de-identified data, and limitation of liability.

What we need:

A written memo (can be informal/bullet points) identifying any provisions that are unenforceable or problematic under Philippine law, whether the data privacy consent language meets NPC requirements for valid consent (freely given, specific, informed), any issues with the governing law / venue clause (Makati City), any gaps — e.g., things Philippine law requires that the contract doesn't address, and any practical recommendations for making the agreement more protective for us as the data collector/controller.

We will provide the Word document for your review.

Requirements:



Licensed attorney in the Philippines

Familiarity with RA 10173 (Data Privacy Act) and NPC issuances

Experience reviewing commercial contracts, data processing agreements, or privacy-related documents

Strong written English

title: Meta Ads Account Manager
description:
ABOUT KORELIMITED

KORELIMITED is a culture-driven fashion brand celebrating Korean heritage through elevated design and storytelling. We exist at the intersection of identity, community, and modern streetwear — creating pieces that honor culture while shaping the future of it.



As we scale our global footprint, we are looking for a data-driven Meta Ads Account Manager to own our paid social ecosystem. You will be responsible for turning our brand story into a high-growth engine through
 and Instagram advertising.



OVERVIEW

The Meta Ads Account Manager will lead the strategy, execution, and optimization of all paid social campaigns. This is a high-impact role that sits at the intersection of creative strategy and technical performance.



You aren't just pushing buttons in Ads Manager; you are analyzing customer behavior, scaling winning creative, and ensuring KORELIMITED reaches the right audience at the right time. You understand that in streetwear, a high ROAS (Return on Ad Spend) comes from the perfect marriage of "The Math" and "The Magic."



RESPONSIBILITIES

Campaign Management & Scaling

Full-Funnel Strategy: Build and manage Meta ad campaigns across the entire customer journey: Prospecting (TOF), Retargeting (MOF/BOF), and Retention/LTV.



Budget Oversight: Manage and scale daily/monthly spend to hit aggressive revenue targets while maintaining efficiency (ROAS/MER).



Technical Setup: Ensure pixel health, Conversions API (CAPI) stability, and accurate catalog management for Advantage+ Shopping Campaigns (ASC).



Creative Strategy & Testing

Creative Directives: Collaborate with the content team to request high-performance assets (UGC, motion graphics, lifestyle photography) based on data-driven insights.



Rigorous A/B Testing: Lead a "test and learn" culture—testing hooks, headlines, formats (Reels vs. Static), and landing pages to constantly lower CAC (Customer Acquisition Cost).



Creative Analysis: Deep-dive into creative metrics (Hook Rate, Hold Rate, CTR) to understand why an ad is winning or losing.



Data & Reporting

Performance Reporting: Provide weekly and monthly reports on key metrics including Spend, Revenue, ROAS, CPA, and New Customer Acquisition.



Audience Insight: Build and refine Lookalike (LAL) audiences and high-intent interest stacks relevant to the streetwear and Asian-American cultural niche.



REQUIREMENTS

3+ years of experience specifically in Meta Ads/Media Buying for an E-commerce/D2C brand (Streetwear/Fashion experience is a major plus).



Proven Track Record: Experience managing 6-figure monthly budgets with a history of scaling brands profitably.



Analytical Mindset: You love spreadsheets as much as you love streetwear. You can look at raw data and turn it into an actionable strategy.



Technical Proficiency: Expert knowledge of Meta Business Suite, Shopify, and attribution tools (e.g., Triple Whale or GA4).



In-Office: This role is based at our HQ to ensure tight collaboration with the design and marketing teams.

title: Tax Team Lead
description:
Role Overview

If you’re someone who takes pride in delivering high-quality tax work, leading a team to perform at a high level, and ensuring nothing slips through the cracks—our Tax Team Lead role is for you.



DiLucci CPA Firm has been serving business owners and real estate investors since 2005. For nearly two decades, we’ve built a reputation for doing tax differently—by going deeper than compliance, telling clients the truth, and using the tax code strategically to protect and grow their wealth. Our mission is simple: help clients keep more of what they earn while giving them clarity, confidence, and a long-term plan. We hold ourselves to a high bar: Genuine Care, Great Communication, Speed to Learning, and Fun Tax Energy. We believe tax planning should be proactive, not reactive—and that great service comes from expertise, communication, and genuine care.



As our Tax Team Lead, you will be responsible for driving the quality, performance, and development of the tax team. This is a high-impact leadership role where you will review complex returns, guide tea
mbers, build systems, and ensure client work is delivered accurately and efficiently. You will play a critical role in scaling the team while maintaining our standard of excellence.

This is a fast-paced, high-ownership role built for someone who is experienced, detail-oriented, and thrives in both technical execution and team leadership.



Key Responsibilities



Technical Review & Complex Tax Work



- Review tax returns with a focus on accuracy, strategy, and compliance

- Handle and prepare more complex returns and resolve nuanced tax issues

- Provide guidance to tea
mbers on technical questions and edge cases



Team Hiring & Evaluation



 - Assist in recruiting and evaluating new tea
mbers

 - Review interviews and participate in working interviews and trial assessments

 - Ensure new hires meet the firm’s technical and cultural standards



Systems & Process Development



 - Build and implement review templates, checklists, and quality control systems

 - Ensure systems are consistently followed across the team

 - Continuously improve workflows to increase efficiency and reduce errors



Training & Development



- Identify skill gaps across the team and support targeted training initiatives

- Assist in developing tea
mbers’ technical capabilities and performance

- Provide ongoing feedback and mentorship to elevate team output



Onboarding & Team Integration



- Support onboarding of new hires to ensure a smooth and effective ramp-up

 -Ensure new tea
mbers are trained on systems, workflows, and expectations

- Maintain consistency in onboarding experience across the team



Quality Control & Client Communication Oversight

- Oversee the quality and tone of client communications across the tax team

- Step in when needed to support or elevate client interactions

- Ensure communication aligns with firm standards of clarity, professionalism, and care



Role Expectations



Maintain a high standard of technical accuracy and attention to detail

- Operate as a leader—proactively identifying issues and solving them

- Ensure consistency and quality across all tax work and client deliverables

- Be highly responsive and available, especially during peak deadlines

- Support the team in a way that drives performance, accountability, and growth



Requirements



- 5+ years of experience in tax preparation and review

- Strong technical knowledge across individual and business tax returns

- Experience reviewing returns and handling complex tax scenarios

- Proven ability to lead, mentor, or support a team

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to high-quality work

- Excellent communication and organizational skills

- Ability to operate in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment





Availability Expectations

Availability via Slack (mobile) during non-working hours and weekends, especially during peak deadlines



DiLucci CPA Core Values

Genuine Care – Trusted advisor relationships, not transactional work

 Great Communication – Clear, proactive, and timely

 Speed to Learning & Implementation – Adapt quickly as laws and strategies evolve

 Fun Tax Energy (FTE) – We take pride in excellent tax work



Job Type: Full-time

Location: Remote (aligned with US working hours, 4PM CST–12AM CST)

Pay: $30,000–$50,000/year (based on experience)

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Data-Driven Bookkeeper | Turn Numbers into Strategy



Are you a numbers wizard who sees the story behind the spreadsheets? We aren’t just looking for someone to "balance the books"—we need a Financial & KPI Specialist who loves precision and thrives on data-informed growth.



If you enjoy reconciling accounts as much as you enjoy building a performance dashboard that reveals the "why" behind the numbers, we want to talk to you.



The Mission

Your role is twofold: Keeping our financial foundation rock-solid. You’ll be the person who alerts us to trends before they become problems and celebrates wins with hard data.



What You’ll Own:

* The Ledger: Flawless management of AR/AP, bank reconciliations, and transaction monitoring.

* The Dashboard: Tracking, analyzing, and reporting on financial and departmental KPIs. You’ll turn raw data into visual insights.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Experience: You have a proven track record in bookkeeping, but you also have a "data analyst" mindset.

* The Tech Savvy: You’re comfortable navigating accounting software and possess advanced skills in reporting tools/dashboards.

* The Eye for Detail: You spot a $0.01 discrepancy from a mile away and notice when a KPI trend looks "off."

* The Communicator: You can explain financial variances to non-finance people without losing them in the jargon.



Why Join Us?

We value transparency, efficiency, and the insights you bring to the table. This isn't just about data entry; it’s about having a seat at the table in how we measure success.



Ready to apply?

We’ve ditched the long-winded
 process. Please jump over to our application form here:

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 5b
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education

title: AI Automation Specialist
description:
Do you look at a manual, repetitive task and think, "There’s an API for that"?



We are looking for a brilliant AI Automation Specialist to help us move at the speed of light. This isn't just a technical role; it’s a creative one. You will be the architect of our digital nervous system—connecting our tools, automating our workflows, and layering in AI to make our team 10x more efficient.



The Mission

Your goal is to eliminate friction. You’ll audit our current workflows, identify bottlenecks, and build automated solutions that allow our humans to focus on high-level strategy while your bots handle the rest.



What You’ll Own:

* Workflow Engineering: Designing and maintaining sophisticated automations (using tools like Zapier, Make/Integromat, or custom scripts).

* AI Integration: Implementing LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic) and AI tools into our daily operations to enhance content, data analysis, and customer touchpoints.

* System Audits: Constantly looking for "waste" in our processes and proposing automated fixes.

* Database Management: Ensuring data flows seamlessly and accurately between our CRM, project management tools, and communication channels.

* Troubleshooting: Being the first responder when a "zap" breaks or an API changes.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Logic Master: You understand "If This, Then That" logic at an advanced level.

* The AI Early Adopter: You aren't just using ChatGPT for
s; you’re building with it. You understand prompt engineering and how to connect AI to external data.

* The Problem Solver: You don’t wait for instructions. You see a broken process and you fix it.

* The Communicator: You can explain a complex automation to a non-tech tea
mber so they understand the value.



Why Join Us?

We don't want a "yes-person." We want a builder. If you have a better way to do things, we’ll give you the tools and the autonomy to build it. Help us define what the future of our firm looks like.



Ready to build the future with us?

Don't just send a resume—show us what you can automate. Start by filling out our application form here:

, phone, and social media to establish interest and suitability.

 or messaging

?

?

title: Social Media Marketing VA
description:
Social Media Marketing VA (Full-Time, Remote)



Platforms: Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, LinkedIn

Schedule: Monday–Friday | 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (New York Time)



About the Role



We are hiring full-time Social Media Marketing VA to manage and grow client social media accounts across Instagram, X 
), TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.



This is a hands-on execution role, not a content-only or automation-based position.



All growth is done manually, using real engagement, strategic targeting, and platform-safe best practices.

No bots. No automation tools. No shortcuts.



Each analyst manages approximately 10 client accounts and is responsible for executing daily growth activities, tracking performance, and maintaining full visibility through documentation and reporting.



If you are detail-oriented, disciplined, and enjoy structured social media growth work, this role is a strong long-term fit.



Important Notes (Please Read Carefully)



No bots, automation tools, or third-party growth apps

All actions are manual and follow strict internal SOPs

Daily documentation, screenshots, and reporting are mandatory

This is a full-time role only (not freelance or part-time)



What You’ll Do



As a Social Media Marketing VA, you will:



Execute manual organic growth across assigned platforms

Follows / unfollows

Likes and comments

Story interactions, profile visits, community engagement

Follow client-approved growth strategies and daily limits

Manage and update daily tracking spreadsheets

Monitor account health, activity, and potential restrictions

Submit weekly summaries and performance updates

Collaborate with Account Manager and Content teams when needed



Job Requirements



To be considered, you must:



Be available full-time only (Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST)

Have reliable high-speed internet

Be comfortable with daily Slack communication and Zoo
etings

Have a verified identity

Own both a computer and a mobile phone (required for account access)

Be willing to follow strict SOPs and documentation rules

Commit to long-term employment (not temporary work)



If you cannot work this schedule or follow structured processes, please do not apply.



Skills We’re Looking For



Strong written and spoken English

Familiarity with Instagram, X/Twitter, TikTok, Pinterest, and LinkedIn

Strong attention to detail and consistency

Ability to follow instructions precisely

Comfortable with repetitive but strategic execution

Prior social media or growth experience is a plus.

Professional, reliable, and accountable



Compensation & Benefits



Fixed monthly salary (paid via PayPal)

Full training and onboarding provided

Opportunities for advancement within the company



About the Team



We are a fully remote team with members across different countries, including the Philippines.

Some tea
mbers have been with us for 6+ years, and we value long-term collaboration, consistency, and accountability.



How to Apply



If you are interested in this position and meet all the requirements above, please complete the application form below:






Qualified candidates will be invited to a Zoom video interview.



We are actively hiring and plan to onboard at least 3 analysts as soon as possible.



Apply only if you are serious about becoming a long-term, high-performing member of our team.

title: Content Specialist & Video Editor
description:
Do you love video editing and want to grow your career in content creation?

In this role, you'll do more than just edit. You’ll be trained on our internal systems to create short-form captions using AI, schedule social media posts through our platform, and manage content workflows for your assigned client.



We are a content agency and we often repurpose longer-form videos for YouTube Shorts, Reels, and TikToks, as well as audiograms and graphics for social media. We also edit their raw videos for YouTube and edit podcast episodes as well.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Edit short-form and long-form content (YouTube, Reels, TikTok, podcasts)

Use our AI captioning system to create short-form captions

Schedule content to automatically post inside our proprietary platform

Follow creative direction and provide consistent, high-quality execution

Participate in weekly training sessions to continually improve your skills

Professional experience with Adobe Premiere, After Effects, or similar tools

Strong eye for motion design and storytelling

Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage your time independently

Positive attitude and willingness to receive feedback

Excellent communication skills and a self-starter mindset

Comfortable learning new tools and systems

Guaranteed client placement upon successful training

Monthly salary of $700 to $1,000 USD paid directly by the client

Weekly training and ongoing support

100% remote work



If you're interested, please respond back with the subject line "It's Me You're Looking For" and include a link to your work. Tell me why we should hire you!

title: Workflow Automation Developer — N8N / API / CRM Integrations
description:
We are a growing US-based home service company building a proprietary backend automation system that will be productized and sold across our industry. This is a ground floor opportunity to build something real that will be used by hundreds of companies.



This is not a task-based VA role. We need a systems thinker who can architect, build, and maintain complex automation workflows independently.



What you'll build



Webhook triggered payment collection systems, job completion to charge to alert flows, failed payment escalation sequences, customer reminder and retreatment workflows, CRM and field service software integrations with our primary platform being FieldRoutes, reporting and dashboard automation, and AI enhanced customer communication flows.



Required skills



Proven n8n experience building real workflows for real businesses, webhook and API integration experience, experience working within CRM or field service platform APIs, JavaScript fundamentals, the ability to work independently with minimal supervision, and availability for US Mountain Time overlap hours.



Strongly preferred



FieldRoutes experience, GoHighLevel experience, field service software experience such as Jobber, ServiceTitan, or HouseCall Pro, SQL basics, AI and LLM integration experience, and a 
 or Zapier background.



Who you are



You think in systems not tasks. You ask why before asking how. You've broken something in production and fixed it. You document your work without being asked. You're looking for a long term home not a short term gig.



Compensation



$1,100 to $2,000 per month full time depending on experience and test project performance. This role has real growth potential as the system we are building scales into a standalone product.



How to apply



Do not send a generic application. Tell me specifically: the most complex workflow you have ever built and walk me through the logic, whether you have worked with field service or CRM platform APIs and which ones and what you automated within them noting that FieldRoutes experience is a bonus but not required, how you handle webhook failures in production, what breaks most often in n8n and how you prevent it, and finally we verify all completed work through live Loom walkthroughs and n8n execution logs — confirm this works for you and describe what your typical workflow documentation process looks like.



Applications without specific answers to all five questions will not be considered.
