Seeking Experienced BSN Nurses (Leadership • Psychiatric • Academic Support)  

1-Year Commitment Preferred



We are seeking experienced BSN-prepared nurses, psychiatric experience to serve in a remote tutoring and academic support role under a church-based nonprofit initiative. This opportunity is ideal for nurses who are studious, responsible, compassionate, socially skilled, and committed to helping others grow academically and professionally.



We are especially interested in nurses with strengths in leadership, psychiatric nursing, tutoring, and academic writing, who are willing to make a serious one-year commitment to serving learners with consistency and integrity.



---



### Tutoring Tracks



1) Psychiatric Nursing / PMHNP Track  

Assessment, psychopathology, psychopharmacology, therapeutic communication, case analysis, treatment planning, and clinical documentation.



2) Nursing Leadership Track  

Leadership, decision-making, communication, professionalism, healthcare systems, team coordination, and quality improvement.



3) Academic Writing & Clinical Documentation Track  

Care plans, case summaries, reflection papers, discussion posts, grammar, organization, and professional writing.



---



### Role Overview

- Remote tutoring and academic coaching  

- Clear explanation of nursing concepts  

- Writing and documentation support  

- Helping learners build discipline, confidence, and professional habits  



---



### Requirements

- BSN required  

- Active RN license required  

- Strong written English and communication skills  

- Experience in leadership, psychiatric nursing, tutoring, or academic support preferred  

- Socially skilled, professional, and able to build rapport  

- Organized, responsible, and detail-oriented  

- Willing to commit for at least one year



---



### Preferred Qualities

- Experienced nurses with leadership ability  

- Strong in psychiatric/mental health topics  

- Studious, patient, dependable, and service-minded  

- Comfortable mentoring and guiding learners  

- Committed to academic integrity and original work



---



### Academic Integrity Standard

Tutors must guide learners using credible sources and proper citation.



No AI-generated academic work is allowed.  

Tutors must not write assignments or submissions for learners. All work must be original and academically honest.



---



### Compensation

Gig-based and performance-based (details shared with selected applicants).



---



### Application Requirements (PDF Format)

1. Resume  

2. BSN diploma  

3. Transcript  

4. Active RN license  

5. Short introduction including:

   - Track(s) applying for  

   - Strongest subject areas  

   - Relevant experience (tutoring, leadership, psychiatric, writing)



---



### Send Applications To





Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Online Psychiatric Nursing Tutor (PMHNP, Leadership, and Academic Writing Tracks)
description:
Job Description:

We are seeking qualified nurses for a remote tutoring role under a developing academic support initiative. This opportunity is ideal for nurses who are strong in teaching, writing, and guiding aspiring healthcare workers in academic and professional development.



Tutors will provide structured support across three tutoring tracks:



1) Psychiatric Nursing / PMHNP Track

Support learners in psychiatric nursing and mental health-related topics such as assessment, psychopathology, psychopharmacology, therapeutic communication, case analysis, treatment planning, and clinical documentation.



2) Nursing Leadership Track (Psych experience) 

Support learners in leadership, decision-making, communication, professionalism, healthcare systems, team coordination, quality improvement, and related nursing leadership topics.



3) Academic Writing and Clinical Documentation Track

Support learners in source-based writing, care plans, case summaries, reflection papers, discussion responses, documentation structure, grammar, organization, and professional written communication.



This role involves tutoring, academic coaching, writing support, and helping learners build stronger professional habits. We are looking for applicants who can explain concepts clearly, write well, and guide others in a responsible and academically honest way.



Requirements:

 • Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) required

 • Active RN license required

 • Strong written English skills

 • Strong academic and professional communication skills

 • Organized, responsible, and detail-oriented

 • Able to tutor, explain concepts clearly, and provide constructive feedback

 • Interest or experience in psychiatric nursing, leadership, documentation, or academic support is an advantage



Important Academic Integrity Standard:

This role requires strong writing ability and respect for original work. Tutors must be comfortable guiding learners using credible sources, proper citation, and clear academic writing.



No AI-generated academic work is allowed.

Tutors must not use AI to write assignments, case analyses, discussion posts, reflection papers, or other academic submissions for learners. All work must be original, source-based, and completed with academic integrity.



Compensation:

Gig-based and performance-based. Further details will be discussed with selected applicants.



Application Requirements:

Please submit the following in clear PDF format:

 1. Updated resume

 2. BSN diploma

 3. Transcript of Records

 4. Active RN license copy

 5. Short written introduction explaining:

 • which track(s) you are applying for

 • your strongest subject areas

 • your experience in tutoring, writing, or documentation support



Send your application to:





Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

title: Sales Admin
description:
Sales Operations Admin | The Engine Behind Our Revenue



Are you the kind of person who gets a dopamine hit from a perfectly organized CRM? Do you believe that a salesperson is only as good as the lead data and follow-up systems supporting them?



We are looking for a Sales Admin who doesn't just "input data" but actively manages the flow of our sales pipeline. You are the air traffic controller for our deals, ensuring nothing falls through the cracks and every lead is handled with precision.



The Mission

Your goal is simple: Maximize the sales team’s selling time. You’ll handle the logistics, the documentation, and the CRM hygiene so our consultants can focus on conversations. You are the "closer's" secret weapon.



What You’ll Own:

* CRM Mastery: Maintaining a spotless database, no duplicate leads, no expired tasks, no missing tags.

* Lead Logistics: Qualifying incoming leads, assigning them to the right reps, and ensuring lightning-fast response times.

* Sales Support: Drafting proposals, sending out contracts, and managing the e-signature process (DocuSign/PandaDoc).

* Calendar Management: Coordinating high-stakes discovery calls and ensuring both the prospect and the rep are prepared.

* Reporting: Providing weekly snapshots of the pipeline—tracking win rates, lead sources, and "stalled" deals.



Are You Our Ideal Candidate?

* The Gatekeeper: You are obsessed with accuracy and follow-through. If a lead hasn't been touched in 24 hours, it bothers you.

* The CRM Expert: You don't just use a CRM; you understand how to optimize it for better workflows.

* The Professional Voice: You have excellent written English. You can draft a follow-up
 that is polite, persistent, and professional.

* The Multitasker: You can jump from an urgent contract edit to a lead-routing task without losing your rhythm.

* The Proactive Partner: You don't wait for a rep to ask for help; you see the bottleneck in the pipeline and clear it.



Why Join Us?

When the sales team wins, you win. We recognize that the "back office" of sales is what actually builds a company. You’ll be a core part of our growth engine, not just a support staff member.



Ready to help us scale?

We value speed and attention to detail. Show us yours by completing our application form here:

Process:

I
 reports

Fleet status

Time gaps

Driver performance

Prepare documentation for next-day operations



Based on internal workflow expectations

Familiarity with:

Cortex (Amazon)

Netradyne

Excel / Google Sheets

Strong communication skills (calls + messaging)

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Must be available to work PST (California time)

Reliable internet and workspace

Strong attention to detail

Takes ownership of dispatch operations

Organized and proactive

Comfortable making decisions quickly



How to Apply

Your internet speed and setup

title: Video Editor Wanted — Documentary YouTube Channel (Long Term)
description:
Video Editor Wanted — Industrial History YouTube Channel (Long Term)



Who I am:

My name is Eddy. I'm a YouTube channel operator based in Vancouver, Canada. I run a channel called Iron & Engine — a documentary-style YouTube channel about the machines that built America. The engineering behind them, the men who ran them, and what was lost when that era ended.

The channel is new but growing fast. I have a clear creative vision and a structured content workflow. What I need is a skilled video editor who can bring that vision to life consistently.



What Iron & Engine is:

Iron & Engine makes long-form documentary videos — typically 20-35 minutes — about industrial history. Line shafts, steam engines, hydraulic presses, factory systems that powered America from the 1800s through the mid-20th century.

The audience is American men aged 55-75. Retired engineers, machinists, factory workers — men who actually operated these machines or grew up hearing about them from their fathers. They are experts. They fact-check. They flood the comments with personal stories when the content is right. When it feels fake or low effort they leave immediately and say so publicly.



This audience demands authenticity. Wrong images, generic AI footage, or obvious AI voiceover kills a video instantly with this demographic. Everything we produce needs to feel like a real documentary — immersive, respectful, and built for someone who spent their career in a factory.



The emotional register we're going for is wonder and scale. Not death, not danger, not disaster. Awe at what human hands built. Deep respect for the men who ran these machines. A sense of loss that this knowledge is almost completely gone.



What the job involves:

For each video you will receive:



A finished voiceover file — professional quality, ready to edit to

A complete script with full context on the subject matter

A technical spec sheet covering all visual standards and requirements

A reference video walkthrough explaining exactly what I'm looking for



Your job is to produce a finished video that matches the voiceover, the script, and the creative vision. This includes:



Sourcing authentic visual assets — real archival video clips with audio, period photographs, and documentary footage. 



Primary sources include Internet Archive, Library of Congress, and YouTube archival channels. You may source from anywhere you can find legitimate public domain or Creative Commons licensed content. All assets must be cleared for commercial use. Copyright violations are never acceptable and will disqualify your submission immediately.



Selecting and editing music that fits the documentary register



Cutting to the voiceover with appropriate pacing for a 55-75 year old audience



Adding chapter transitions, credibility captions, and selective text overlays per the spec sheet



Submitting a source list with every deliverable



On archival footage vs still images: Real archival video clips of machines actually operating — with real audio — are the gold standard. Still photographs are the secondary option. AI-generated images are acceptable only if they are photorealistic, era-accurate, and completely imperceptible as AI. If it looks generated it fails. Think camouflage.



On music: You select the music. It should feel like a serious documentary — soft, measured, historically appropriate. It should elevate the visuals and keep the viewer immersed without ever calling attention to itself. You have creative freedom here as long as it serves the content and the audience.



This is not a gig:



I am building a media company. Iron & Engine is one channel. I have others planned and in development. The landscape is competitive and moving fast — I need to scale quickly and I need skilled people to help me do it.



The editor who proves themselves on this channel will grow with this operation. More channels, more volume, more responsibility. Eventually a leadership role helping manage other editors as the team expands. I am looking for someone hungry, skilled, and reliable — not just someone who can cut a video, but someone who cares about the craft and wants to build something long term.



I take care of people who perform. This is a real long term opportunity with real growth potential.



What I'm looking for in you:



Strong experience editing long-form documentary or educational YouTube content



Comfortable sourcing archival footage and photographs from public archives



Experience with or willingness to learn AI image and video generation tools



Understands pacing for an older audience — not a fast-cut editor



Reliable, communicative, and takes feedback well



Hungry to grow and be part of something being built from the ground up



The sample task:



I am currently reviewing editors and will evaluate all samples carefully.

To apply, watch the reference video walkthrough I recorded — it explains exactly what I'm looking for, including two competitor videos analyzed with specific timestamps showing what to copy and what to avoid:







Example video 1: 



Example video 2: 



Then download your sample materials here:



Full script: 



48-second voiceover clip (WAV): 



Technical spec sheet: 



Your task is to produce a 48-second edited video using that voiceover clip. This is the opening hook of a full video called "The Line Shaft That Powered 100,000 American Factories."



About the subject matter: A line shaft was the system that powered every factory in America before electricity. A single steam engine or waterwheel drove an iron shaft running the full length of the factory ceiling. Leather belts dropped from that shaft to every machine on the floor — lathes, looms, drill presses, everything. One hundred thousand American factories ran this way. The script opens with a worker standing on the factory floor in 1890, looking up at a ceiling alive with spinning shafts and belts, 100 workers already at their stations, every machine in motion before anyone touches a lever.

This 48-second opening is the hook. It is the most important part of the entire video. Our audience d
 within the first 5 seconds whether they are staying or leaving. The editing needs to be exceptional.



What I'm grading:



1. Footage authenticity Did you find real archival video clips or photographs of factory floors and line shaft machinery from the 1890s-1920s? Real footage with real machine audio is the highest score. Still photographs are second. AI-generated images are acceptable only if completely imperceptible.



2. Music Does it fit and elevate the visuals? Does it keep the viewer immersed without calling attention to itself?



3. Pacing Does every cut respond to the voiceover or feel arbitrary? Does the edit give the content room to breathe? Remember the audience — older viewers do not like fast cuts.



4. Immersion Would a 65-year-old retired machinist watch this opening and feel like he is standing on that factory floor in 1890?



5. Restraint This is the most important criterion. Do not pack 48 seconds with rapid cuts, constant transitions, and back-to-back clip changes to show me what you can do. That is the wrong instinct for this audience. I want to see an editor who knows when to hold, when to cut, and when to let a single powerful image sit while the narration does the work. Busy and overproduced fails. Measured, immersive, and confident passes.



6. AI asset quality If you used any AI-generated images or video clips, flag them in your source list. I will ask: does it look authentic? Does it match the era? Did it fool me? I work with AI tools every day and am above average at detecting AI. If you can genuinely fool me — that earns bonus points. Transparency plus quality is what I am grading. Do not hide that you used AI. Just make sure it is good enough that you could have.



Extra credit: The reference videos I analyzed are a starting point, not a ceiling. I have only looked at two videos. If you do your own research — watch more content in this niche, study what is working, find a technique that elevates emotional impact that I have not mentioned — and incorporate it into your sample, that earns extra credit. I want to see what you notice that I did not. Just remember the audience. Extra credit does not mean flashier or busier. It means deeper immersion for a 55-plus American male who spent his career in a factory. Research that audience. Research that niche. Bring what you find.



Compensation:

$
USD per month depending on experience and output volume. We will discuss specifics after reviewing your sample. This is a long term retainer position, not per-video payment.



How to apply:



Watch the reference video walkthrough: 



Produce your 48-second sample



Upload to Google Drive and
 me with the link and your source list



Do not send a cover letter. Do not send your portfolio. Just watch the video,
 me to request the materials, and send your sample when it is ready.



One final note:



I know you have probably heard pitches like this before. All I can say is that I am genuinely committed to building this operation long term and I take care of the people who help me get there. If you are skilled, hungry, and reliable — this is a real opportunity worth pursuing.



Talk soon.

— Eddy

title: Experienced Full-time Associate Site Merchandiser for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Associate Site Merchandiser who is hard-working, very detail-oriented, analytical, organized, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 



It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Associate Site Merchandiser is responsible for ensuring the product assortment across our brands is populated with the appropriate selling attributes; collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to define new assortment strategies, test new product categories, and report on performance. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment and contribute to the success of a high growth business.



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 1-3 years of experience in online merchandising. 

• High attention to detail, process oriented, strong project management, analytical, problem solving and verbal/written communication skills. 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 

• Familiar with Content Management systems.



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Support the day-to-day management, merchandising and revenue growth of our brands with an emphasis on site productivity, sales growth and conversion. A primary focus of this role is the optimization of the online merchandising strategy to ensure that the right product is in the right place and at the right time. Work with our team in the planning of weekly and monthly product placements and product stories.



• Efficiently on-board new SKUs from our vendor partners, placing those SKUs in the proper categories, adding selling attributes, enriching meta data, and building SEO on-page copy. 



• Assist in the development and help maintain the online merchandising and related item strategies to drive sales, conversion rate and overall profitability for the site. Utilize relevant reporting and analysis to communicate online business trends and SKU level performance. Conduct and provide regular competitive analysis to identify best practices and recommend action steps.



• Effectively merchandise products within the product category structure in an effort to influence conversion rate and sales. Utilize all available data points (consumer demand, product inventory, product margin, shipping damage rates, etc.) in an effort to drive profitability for the ecommerce channel. This will include upselling, cross selling, catalog structure management, and creation of product specific landing pages.



• Partner with the team for SEO to positively affect conversion rate and sales through search results. Review customer search behavior to gain an understanding of keyword queries and manipulate the products within the search results page in a manner that drives overall profitability for the ecommerce channel.



• Coordinate with Marketing team to gain a full understanding of all content 
, social, display, search, digital integrations, etc.) potentially driving traffic back to the sites. Merchandise landing pages in a manner that supports the various marketing mediums while keeping profitability of the ecommerce channel top of mind. 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 



We look forward to hearing from you!

environment while maintaining exceptional customer service standards.

i
.

.

, and ticketing system, ensuring high first-call resolution rates for

title: Customer Service Specialist — Shopify E-Commerce Brand
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a growing Shopify brand looking for a highly capable and self-driven Customer Service Specialist to own and run our entire customer service operation. This is not a basic support role, we need someone who can handle the day-to-day with consistency, proactively identify opportunities to improve our processes, and help us build a strong CS infrastructure as we scale.



You will be the first point of contact for our customers across multiple channels, including support tickets, social media, and payment disputes. We want someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and shows up consistently every single day.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



-Managing all customer service communications across our Shopify store

-Handling inquiries, complaints, returns, refunds, and order-related issues via Gorgias

-Following established workflows and SOPs precisely — and handling edge cases confidently when no SOP exists

-Proactively identifying rising or recurring issues (e.g. product complaints, delivery problems, policy gaps) and flagging them before they escalate

-Delivering daily reports and insights on CS performance, trends, and customer sentiment

-Advising on improvements to our CS workflows, tools, and overall department setup

-Helping us build out and document new SOPs, processes, and automations as we grow

-Collaborating with the team via Slack and keeping internal documentation up to date in Notion and Google Sheets

-Moderating our Meta 
) presence — removing negative or harmful comments, responding to positive engagement, and handling customer DMs in a timely and on-brand manner

-Managing chargebacks and payment disputes on both Shopify Payments and PayPal — submitting evidence, responding within deadlines, and working to recover lost revenue



REQUIRED TOOLS



Gorgias

Shopify

Slack

Google Sheets

Notion

 / Meta

PayPal

ParcelPanel (ParcelWill)



REQUIREMENTS



-Minimum 2 years (but more is expected) of experience in customer service within a Shopify e-commerce environment

-Proficient with all tools listed above (Gorgias, Shopify, Slack, Google Sheets, Notion)

-Hands-on experience with Meta moderation — managing 
ments and customer DMs in a professional, brand-appropriate way

-Proven experience handling chargebacks and payment disputes on Shopify Payments and PayPal, including building evidence packages and meeting response deadlines

-Strong spoken and written English — we require a 9/10 level of fluency. Your communication must be clear, professional, and natural at all times

- Include the word apple somewhere in your application otherwise we won't read it

-Able to follow SOPs to the letter, while also exercising sound judgment in situations not covered by existing processes

-Strong attention to detail — you notice patterns and issues before they become problems

-Self-motivated — you do not need to be chased to complete your work

-Consistent — your output and availability are reliable every working day

-Able to produce clear, concise daily reports on CS activity, issues, and insights



LARGE BONIS IF YOU HAVE:



Previous experience as a CS Manager or team lead

Experience building CS workflows or SOPs from scratch



WHAT WE VALUE



We are a small, focused team. We are not looking for someone who needs constant direction — we need someone who can take ownership of this department, bring ideas to the table, and execute reliably without hand-holding. Proactivity, consistency, and clear communication are non-negotiables for us.



HOW TO APPLY



Please apply with a short introduction covering your relevant experience and the tools you have worked with. We also ask that you include a breakdown of a few of your previous positions. For each one, tell us: what your role involved, what you excelled at, and what your main challenge or struggle was. Be honest we value self-awareness as much as experience.



Please also include one or two examples of how you have improved a CS operation or successfully handled disputes or social media moderation in a previous role.

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Energi

Energi (NRG) is a scalable and secure blockchain ecosystem, designed to power the next generation of Web3 applications, DeFi protocols, and NFT marketplaces. Built on a robust Proof of Stake (PoS) infrastructure, Energi combines Ethereum compatibility, on-chain governance, a self-funding treasury, and a Layer 2 masternode network to drive innovation in decentralized technology.

Our remote-first team spans the Americas, Europe, Africa, Asia, and Oceania, working together to push the boundaries of blockchain scalability and security. With a growing network of global contributors, we are committed to building a blockchain that is not only secure but also developer-friendly and highly scalable.

Energi is engineered to support millions of users, making it an ideal platform for high-performance dApps, NFT marketplaces, and decentralized finance solutions. Our ecosystem is designed for fast, cost-effective transactions with a focus on long-term sustainability.

By fostering collaboration, innovation, and a forward-thinking culture, Energi is redefining the Web3 landscape. Explore our vision and mission at 
.





WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:

-Work flexible hours from anywhere as part of a globally distributed team driven by innovation and shared values.

-Directly shape the future of blockchain technology in NFT development.

-Enhance your skills and creativity with cutting-edge blockchain, smart contract, and Web3 technologies.

-Be part of an advanced blockchain ecosystem and contribute to building next-gen NFT platforms.

-Competitive pay structure in a 50/50 split of ETH and NRG tokens.



Front-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We seek a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer specializing in NFT platforms to drive the front-end development of our decentralized applications. You’ll create immersive Web3 experiences while integrating blockchain-based features like Metamask and smart contracts.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Work closely with UX designers to create seamless NFT marketplaces and dApps.

-Develop interactive front-end features integrating Web3.js and smart contracts.

-Optimize UI performance and ensure mobile responsiveness.

-Maintain existing applications and introduce new blockchain features.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of experience in front-end development.

-Proficient in React, Gatsby, and Web3 frameworks.

-Experience integrating blockchain wallets like Metamask.

-Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.

-Fluent English communicator with a passion for blockchain.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Experience with Web3, Infura, and The Graph.

-Familiarity with NFT metadata standards and ERC-721/ERC-1155.

-SEO optimization skills.



Back-End Role

JOB OVERVIEW:

We’re looking for a Blockchain Full-Stack Engineer to build the backend for NFT applications. You’ll be responsible for designing, maintaining, and optimizing APIs that connect blockchain smart contracts with scalable Web3 applications.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Develop secure APIs that interact with NFT smart contracts.

-Optimize backend infrastructure for high-traffic NFT transactions.

-Implement blockchain indexing solutions for NFT metadata retrieval.

-Write unit tests to ensure security and efficiency.



ESSENTIAL REQUIREMENTS:

-3+ years of back-end development experience.

-Proficiency in Golang, NodeJS, and GraphQL.

-Experience with blockchain data structures and decentralized storage.

-Passionate about blockchain innovation and fluent in English.



NICE TO HAVE:

-Knowledge of smart contract security best practices.

-Prior experience with NFT minting platforms.

-Remote work experience.



This role is not open to 3rd party organizations or agencies. Any candidates sent will be considered free of any charges



Energi is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, pregnancy, disability, age, veteran status, or other characteristics.

/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

 handle

description:

 with professionalism and empathy.

title: B2B Appointment Setter (High Commissions)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am Jordan! I am looking for 1 elite appointment setter for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for just 1 person to do outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help Roofers with an A.I. Receptionist to answer missed calls and after hours calls. Right now every day I cold call myself and it's been a lot of fun, but as I grow I am looking to outsource this responsibility.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads

-- Call roofers and ask if they want to schedule a free consultation to learn about A.I. and their businesses

-- Schedule them, and make sure they show-up to their appointment.

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- No heavy accent.

-- You care more about making commissions for each sold appointment. If you are someone that relies on hourly do not apply.

-- You are a hard worker. You do not call out sick, make excuses, or show-up late.



PAYMENT:

-- $3-6/hour base (depending on experience). 

-- $25 each appointment that shows up

-- $200 each appointment that signs up for our services

-- $50-$500 in monthly bonuses. Yup, really!

-- Expect to make $650-$1,500 for PART TIME WORK.



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.  If you talk about other jobs you will be disqualified as we only want to talk about jobs that relate to the job we are offering.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" in your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application:

1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B and appointment setting (only put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):

2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed):

3) How many calls per day did you average:

4) How many appointments per week did you average:

5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

6) Do you currently have another job:

7) Are you willing to complete a short calling test before being hired:

description:
Customer Relationship & Retention Specialist (Team Lead & Systems Setup)

To architect and lead the transformation of our existing database into a self-sustaining referral engine. You will be responsible for setting up the referral team, establishing the operational framework, and building long-term relationships that drive repeat sales and new introductions.

Referral Generation: Systematically ask for and track referrals from our happy client base.

Post-Service Excellence: Follow up on recent deliveries to ensure the product experience meets our standards, strengthening long-term loyalty.

title: Aquisition Manager (Real Estate Investing)
description:
We are a growing real estate investment company. We acquire residential, and land properties through cash offers targeting distressed and motivated sellers across North America.



We are looking for a hungry, self-motivated Acquisition Manager to join our team on a commission-only basis. This is a performance-based role ideal for someone who thrives in sales, loves real estate, and wants unlimited earning potential.



RESPONSIBILITIES:



- Follow up with warm and cold leads generated.

- Speak directly with motivated sellers, build rapport, and negotiate purchase agreements

- Negotiate the lowest possible acquisition price  your commission is tied to profit, so the better you negotiate, the more you earn

- Analyze basic property details and comparable sales to determine offer pricing (training provided)

- Present cash offers to sellers and handle objections

- Guide sellers through the contract and closing process

- Update CRM with deal progress, notes, and status changes

- Meet or exceed monthly acquisition targets

-This is not a fulltime job. The only thing that's required is you must be able to call warm lead IMMEDIATELY as it comes through, so you must be on stand by.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Excellent English communication skills (phone and written)

- Experience in real estate, sales, or cold calling (MUST)

-Must have Real Estate Investing Knowledge and how it works

- Ability to handle rejection and stay persistent

- Strong negotiation skills and ability to build trust quickly

- Comfortable using CRM tools

- Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

- Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace for calls

- Available to work during North American business hours (EST)



COMPENSATION:

- Commission: 5% of the after-sale profit per completed deal

- Estimated earnings: $500 (minimum / month) with commissions up to $6,000 per month.

- The lower you negotiate the acquisition price, the higher the profit, and the bigger your commission your skills directly impact your pay.

- No cap on earnings, the more deals you close, the more you earn

- Average deal cycle: 2-16 weeks

- Top performers can realistically close 4+ deals per month





WHY JOIN US:

- Leads are generated for you. No need to build your own pipeline

- Work remotely from anywhere

- Be part of a fast-growing, tech-driven real estate investment firm

- Opportunity to grow into a leadership role as we scale

- Training and scripts provided to get you started



This is a START position we need someone ready to hit the ground running immediately. If you have the drive and want to earn based on results, apply now.

title: Influencer Marketing Role | Direct Client |PH / Morning Shift
description:
Who Are We?

Nordic Quality is an extremely awesome, up-and-coming, online-based company selling physical products under several of our brands. The main one of which is in the gym and fitness category.



Who are we looking for?

We are looking for an Influencer Marketing Manager with some familiarity in Social Media Management to play a crucial role at Nordic Quality, a company specializing in gym equipment and weight-lifting products. This role involves managing and expanding partnerships with fitness influencers, as well as overseeing the brand’s social media presence across platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and
. The ideal candidate is passionate about health and fitness, stays up to date with social media trends, and has experience building engaging content and communities in the gym and weightlifting space.



WHAT WOULD THE TASK BE?



-Build all processes for acquiring new digital influencers, as well as maintaining existing ones.

-Identifying the most relevant influencers in the industry on major and minor social media channels such as YouTube,
, Instagram, Slickdeals, etc., by doing research and/ or using tools.

Form relationships with influencers before asking them to advocate for the products or the company in general.

- Persuade digital influencers to promote our products with little to no upfront cost;

- Ensure that all possible measures have been taken to retain existing influencers.

- Establish a Sponsored Athlete Program, affiliate programs, and partnerships with influencers, and manage everything related to these.

- Set up and take charge of activities surrounding the Influencer page on the company website;

- Boost the brand's online presence on relevant forums/message boards by responding to comments and subtly promoting our products.

- Lead the department dedicated to influencer marketing, once set up, and collaborate with other team members of other departments whenever necessary.

- Come up with a marketing plan/strategy on a weekly/monthly basis (work alongside the marketing manager to do this, especially for our product promotions);

- Tally UGCs for content posting on social media, including Instagram,
, YouTube, and TikTok.

- Social Media Management: Plan, coordinate, and schedule social media content on
, Instagram, and TikTok at least two weeks (14 days) in advance while also managing real-time updates and promotional posts in collaboration with the Marketing team/Marketing Assistant to keep calendars accurate, timely, and aligned with campaign priorities.

- Manage some Amazon Ads or work on other Amazon-related tasks in Amazon US, Amazon UK, and Amazon Japan (using ChatGPT whenever needed);

- Create an attribute link for promotions and influencers and analyze them as part of the KPI every month.

- Create and manage campaigns and influencers on Amazon Creator Connections regularly.

- Create and maintain updated SOPs for the Influencer Team.

- Regularly review existing SOPs and make adjustments as needed.

- Other related tasks or tasks in the marketing department.

- Slack (communication tool) visibility during the contractor’s working hours.



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in lead generation, influencer outreach, and social media management. Preferably in the e-commerce or fitness industry (but not necessarily)

- Familiarity with lead generation tools and CRM systems (is a plus!)

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

-Has experience with Canva

- Has an interest in creating compelling social media posts

- Ability to multitask, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

- Knowledge of basic marketing principles and techniques.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



You must also have the following;

- With a perfectly working device (additional backup is a plus)

- With a reliable internet connection (additional backup is required)

- Headphones/earphones (for meetings)



HOW TO APPLY?

Congratulations on making it this far in the job application process! Interested? We'd be delighted to hear from you.

Please carefully follow all of the instructions below to send an application:



1. Use the following as the subject of your message:

Influencer Marketing - (Insert Your Full Name Here)

Example: Influencer Marketing - Maria Santos



2. Cover Letter - The body of your message will serve as your cover letter, so discuss your experience and persuade me to add you to the team while highlighting your writing abilities.



3 The link to your CV/ resume (strictly with your picture)





Thank you & Best of luck!

title: Systems Automation & Workflow Architect
description:
Core Objective:

We are seeking a systems-driven expert to design, build, and optimize our digital infrastructure. Your mission is to eliminate manual bottlenecks, ensure a "Single Source of Truth" across all platforms, and architect automated workflows that allow our operations to scale seamlessly without increasing manual overhead.



Key Responsibilities

End-to-End Automation: Audit existing business processes and replace them with high-efficiency automated workflows across marketing, sales, and operations.



Platform Integration: Expertly manage and synchronize our tech stack—including GoHighLevel (GHL), Zapier, Make (Integromat), and various CRM/Project Management tools—to ensure seamless data flow.



System Auditing: Conduct regular "health checks" on our data and processes to identify friction points, data silos, or automation failures.



SOP Development: Create and maintain clear, technical documentation (Standard Operating Procedures) for all newly implemented automated systems.



Data Architecture: Maintain database integrity and ensure all lead/customer information is accurately captured and transitioned between systems.



Administrative Support: Manage high-level technical admin tasks, including API troubleshooting, webhook configurations, and user permission management.



Requirements & Schedule

Experience: 3+ years of professional experience specifically in Systems Auditing, Business Process Mapping, or Automations.



Technical Proficiency: Expert-level knowledge of GoHighLevel, Zapier, and automation logic. Familiarity with CRM architectures and Project Management tools (e.g., ClickUp, Notion, or Zoho) is highly preferred.



Analytical Mindset: A strong ability to translate complex business problems into structured, automated solutions.



Schedule: This is a full-time position.



Working Hours: 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Australian Time (AEST/AEDT).



Success Metrics (KPIs)

Efficiency Gain: Measurable reduction in manual hours spent on repetitive administrative tasks.



Data Integrity: Elimination of duplicate entries and 100% synchronization across integrated platforms.



System Reliability: High uptime and low error rates for all active automated workflows.



How to Apply:

If you are a systems architect who thrives on creating order out of chaos and building scalable digital engines, please apply. Attached your resume and application letter.

title: Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Specialist)
description:
Part-Time | Remote | £6 per hour



About the Role

We are recruiting on behalf of a growing UK-based accountancy firm, an 8-figure firm, seeking a detail-oriented and highly accurate Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Specialist) to support their client portfolio.



This is a key role responsible for maintaining clean, compliant, and up-to-date financial records across multiple clients. You will work closely with the Director to ensure bookkeeping is completed to a high standard, deadlines are met, and all records are fully prepared for accountant review.



Note: This is not basic data entry — this role requires ownership of bookkeeping, accuracy, and workflow.



Working Hours

10:00am – 3:00pm UK Time (Tuesday & Thursday)

5:00pm – 10:00pm Philippines Time



Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & QuickBooks Management

Maintain accurate, up-to-date records in QuickBooks Online

Post and allocate bank transactions

Manage purchase invoices and expenses

Post sales invoices and allocate receipts

Maintain clean and accurate ledgers (debtors, creditors, nominal)

Perform bank, credit card, and balance sheet reconciliations

Prepare VAT returns and support submissions

Process journal entries (within competence)

Ensure all records are fully supported and audit-ready



Deadlines & Workflow Management

Manage VAT, month-end, and reporting deadlines

Start work early and avoid last-minute deadlines

Request missing information proactively

Keep all work progressing without backlog



Client Communication

Respond to client queries within 1 working day

Communicate clearly and professionally

Keep communication simple and commercially aware

Escalate anything outside your level of expertise



Data Accuracy & Cleanliness

Maintain clean ledgers with no duplication or miscoding

Ensure all accounts are fully reconciled

Clear suspense accounts promptly

Monitor aged debtors and creditors

Regularly review bank feeds and financial data



Escalation & Awareness

Identify and flag unusual transactions

Highlight compliance risks or inconsistencies

Raise cash flow concerns where relevant

Escalate anything unclear or outside your scope



Reporting

Provide weekly updates on:



Work completed

Work in progress

Missing information

Risks or issues



Essential Skills & Experience

Strong experience using QuickBooks Online (non-negotiable)

Proven experience in bookkeeping or accountancy support

Strong understanding of reconciliations, VAT, and ledgers

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Strong English communication skills

Able to manage workload independently

Organised and process-driven



What We’re Looking For

We want someone who:



Takes full ownership of their work

Keeps financial records clean, accurate, and review-ready

Works proactively (not reactively)

Manages deadlines without being chased

Communicates clearly with both clients and internal team

Spots issues early and raises them



What This Role Isn’t

Not basic data entry

Not leaving reconciliations unfinished

Not allowing backlog to build

Not ignoring errors or inconsistencies



How to Apply:

Use “Vixa Hire” in the subject line of your application.

Send your resume and cover letter.

Include your internet speed test result and a screenshot of your laptop specs.



If you’re a detail-driven QuickBooks specialist who takes pride in clean, accurate bookkeeping, this is a great opportunity to take ownership within a growing UK accountancy firm.

title: Software Engineer (AI / Machine Learning) – Project / Casual Role
description:
AU Hours (AEST/AEDT) | Project / Casual Engagement



About the Role



We’re looking for a skilled Software Engineer with AI/ML experience to join our team on a project or casual basis, supporting Australian-based clients.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys working on cutting-edge AI applications, including LLMs, GenAI, and scalable cloud systems, while collaborating with international teams.

LLM-powered applications

Embeddings & vector search

RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipelines

Collaborate with product and design teams to turn ideas into solutions

Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Nice to Have

Work Setup



Fully remote (Philippines-based)

Flexible schedule for high-performing candidates

Project-based / casual engagement (potential for ongoing work)



Why Join Us?

Be part of a team pushing AI into practical business use



How to Apply



Please include:

Updated resume

Brief summary of your AI/ML project experience

Your availability (hours per week)

Your expected hourly or project rate

title: Real Estate Listings - Customer Relationship Manager
description:
Listing Experience Manager



This person is responsible for building a relationship with our customers during the MLS Listing process. 



Requirements:

- Real Estate Experience in US markets - minimum 3 years

- Fluency with speaking and understanding english

- Working Eastern Time Zone (we are open 7 days a week, 9 am - 10 pm Eastern Time). Schedule will be hours during these times and may require one weekend day

- Computer and at least 1 extra monitors

- Reliable internet back up

- Reliable power back up



Responsibilities include:

- verifying property ownership using public records and other tools

- follow rules and requirements of MLS and state

- communicating via phone and
 to our customers with what we need to get their property listed

- setting up pre-listing inspections as needed (with a 3rd party)

- complete and detailed file documentation

- following a checklist to be sure all tasks are completed before property is listed in MLS by a listing assistant

- making welcome calls and post-listing calls to customers

- checking to see if syndication to zillow and 
 is correct (and documenting)

- checking to see if Showing Time or Broker Bay is set up correctly (and documenting)

- following a workflow so everyone can work efficiently

- multitasking across files and tasks

- taking phone calls from customers with questions



Salary:

- $5.50 per hour

- full time / long term

- 10 days per year Paid Time Off (pro-rata based on start date)

- Eligible for Performance Incentive Bonus



Background on LWF

 

Established in 2005, ListWithFreedom (LWF) is a comprehensive residential real estate platform and direct listing broker which helps sellers save thousands of dollars in the process of listing and selling their homes.

 

LWF was developed by experienced, licensed real estate professionals, with the mission to give sellers complete control over their MLS listing and enabling them to sell their homes for the maximum possible value. The company provides a full suite of tools & support needed in the home listing and selling process, including photos and descriptions, electronically signed documents, and a listing on the MLS within 24-48 hours. The entire experience and process is online.

  

In addition to listing on the MLS, homes are also showcased on all the real estate websites that buyers visit when seeking a home. This includes Zillow, Trulia, 
, 
, 
 and hundreds more. 

  

For more information, check out our company's site:   

 

******




 set out in 2005 to change the way real estate is sold. And we have done just that. We offer homeowners a way to sell their properties by listing on the Multiple Listing Service (MLS) for a low flat fee. Our customers are able to list on their own and save thousands of dollars. ListWithFreedom will list our customers’ homes in the MLS and 3rd party websites, and expose their property to thousands of agents who have ready, willing, and able buyers.



Our 6 Core Values shape everything we do at ListWithFreedom and form the basis for our decision making, process design, and strategic planning.



Trust - be reliable, loyal and dependable 

Quality - get it right, never stop improving

Passion - we love what we do 

Kindness - better to be kind than to be right

Innovation - there’s always a way

Education - fearlessly spread knowledge and ability



ListWithFreedom does not discriminate on the basis of race, creed, color, ethnicity, national origin, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression, age, height, weight, veteran status, military obligations, or marital status. Each individual at ListWithFreedom brings their own perspectives, work experiences, lifestyles, and cultures with them, and we believe that a more diverse team creates more innovative products, provides a better service to its customers, and helps us all grow and learn as individuals.



Take a look at what we have to offer. Visit 
 today to learn more.

title: US Payroll Tax Position
description:
Job Posting: Payroll Tax Specialist (Remote – Eastern Time Hours)



Location: Remote (Must be available to work Monday–Friday, 8:30am - 5:00pm PM EST)

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Payroll & Compliance

Reports To: Payroll Manager / Controller



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Payroll Tax Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will play a critical part in ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance across multiple states and jurisdictions. You will regularly interface with the IRS, state Departments of Revenue (DORs), and Departments of Labor (DOLs) to conduct tax research, respond to notices, and remit tax payments multiple times per week.

If you're highly organized, thrive under pressure, and never miss a deadline, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Key Responsibilities

Ensure accurate and timely remittance of payroll tax payments (federal, state, and local) multiple times per week.

Interface directly with the IRS, state DoRs, and DoLs to resolve tax issues, research changes in tax laws, and respond to inquiries or audits.

Perform regular reconciliations of payroll tax liabilities and filings.

Maintain accurate records of all tax payments and communications for audit and compliance purposes.

Track and manage tax notices, resolve discrepancies, and ensure full compliance with applicable laws and filing deadlines.

Collaborate with payroll and finance teams to maintain accuracy in payroll processing and tax calculations.

Use tools such as Excel and Asana to manage tasks and track progress.

Support payroll-related projects and audits as needed.



Required Qualifications

Minimum of 2 years' experience in US payroll tax operations, with demonstrated experience interacting with tax agencies.

Strong knowledge of US federal and state payroll tax regulations.

 Qualifications

title: Virtual Assistant - Real Estate Experience is a Bonus
description:
We are a growing real estate team looking for a highly motivated, independent, creative, organized Virtual Assistant. The ideal candidate will be professional, able to take initiative, works well with clients, suppliers and other agents and able to focus on the priorities of a rapidly changing day. This position performs a wide variety of administrative support services, ranging from complex to routine, all of which contribute to the efficient and professional operation of our real estate business.

Administrative & Executive Assistant Functions

Arrange showings and prepare showing materials Scheduling and booking appointments for showings and printing and organizing documents for showings and presentations



Filing, manage files (digital and hard copy systems) and completing and compiling documents for trade records

Arrange couriers, deliveries and pick-ups such as pick up new cheques or keys from tenants

Technology & Software



Understanding and marketing listings on Social media - LinkedIn,
,
, Instagram, Youtube, etc.

Manage client database CRM &
 systems - lofty



Toronto TREB Stratus MLS, Broker Bay, Webforms, Docusign/Authentisign, Quickbooks, Adobe Photoshop, Canva would be an asset







Qualifications and Skills



Preferred Skill Sets:



Pleasant personality and strong interpersonal skills

Administrative experience would be an asset



Computer literate; ability to use, learn and understand various software programs very well

title: Nurse Content Reviewer & Curriculum Assistant
description:
We are developing a new educational document for nursing students and need a sharp, academically strong nursing student or nurse to critically review and enhance our content. This role is focused on ensuring our material aligns with current nursing curriculum standards, is academically accurate, and is pedagogically sound. You will be working closely with our in-house Nurse and Graphic Designer. This is a project-based, remote contract/internship position.



Key Responsibilities

Curriculum Alignment Check: Review chapters to ensure the content, terminology, and concepts are consistent with the latest nursing curriculum (CMO/CHED standards) and current institutional teachings.



Content Relevance Review: Assess the material for academic accuracy and clarity, pointing out any sections that are confusing, outdated, or poorly explained from a student's perspective.



Restructuring Input: Offer suggestions on how topics are ordered, grouped, and presented to maximize student comprehension and retention.



Collaboration: Provide input to the Nurse and Graphic Designer regarding the effectiveness of planned educational visuals (charts, tables, diagrams) for student learning.



Proofreading: Assist with proofreading and editing for grammatical and technical errors.



What You'll Bring (Required Qualifications)

We are looking for a highly motivated student with excellent academic standing and a strong grasp of fundamental nursing principles.



Academic Status: Currently enrolled as a student in a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) program or a nurse.



Academic Excellence: Strong academic records are preferred 



Knowledge: Solid foundational knowledge in core nursing subjects (e.g., Anatomy & Physiology, Fundamentals of Nursing, Medical-Surgical Nursing).



Skills:



Excellent written and verbal communication abilities in English.



Strong critical thinking and attention to detail for identifying errors.



Proficiency with digital documents Canva & Procreate



Self-starter attitude with an ability to manage time effectively.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume/CV, a brief cover letter, and include the following:



Your current year level and university.



A brief description of one subject or topic from your studies that you feel is exceptionally well-structured and why, or one that could be greatly improved.

description:

I also sell a digital product (Land Buying Blueprint) and run a newsletter.

 capture)

This is NOT a single landing page funnel.

 • No flashy animations

Think:

? clarity over creativity

? trust over hype

 capture / funnels

Please do NOT apply if your style is:

That is not what I’m looking for.



Looking forward to working with someone who understands clean, practical design.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
Job Title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)

Location: Remote, Philippines

Engagement Type: Full-time contractor

Company: Sprint Labs

Client Account: Linxio



Sprint Labs is hiring a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative to support one of our clients in Australia, an established provider of GPS tracking and fleet management solutions.



This is a full-time remote role for someone in the Philippines who is confident on the phone, comfortable with cold outreach, and hungry to build pipeline. You will be responsible for generating interest from prospective business customers through outbound prospecting across phone,
, and LinkedIn.



This role is not about sitting back and waiting for leads to come in. We want someone who can take ownership of the top of funnel, actively build lists, work leads with persistence, and create qualified opportunities for the sales team.



You will be engaged by Sprint Labs and work closely on the company account, helping drive new business conversations and booked demos.



What you’ll be doing



As the SDR, you will own outbound prospecting activity from start to finish.



Your day-to-day work will include:

 • Prospecting potential clients through cold calling, cold
, and LinkedIn outreach

 • Building and managing prospect lists using tools such as Apollo, Dripify, HubSpot, and other sales and marketing platforms

 • Working from lead lists provided by the business, while also sourcing and identifying your own target accounts and contacts

 • Reaching out to decision-makers and key stakeholders to introduce Linxio’s solution

 • Following up consistently across multiple channels to generate interest and move prospects forward

 • Qualifying prospects to determine fit, interest level, and next steps

 • Booking demos directly into the sales representative’s calendar where appropriate

 • Handing over warm opportunities and qualified lead details to the sales representative for further follow-up

 • Keeping CRM records accurate and up to date

 • Tracking outreach activity, response rates, leads generated, and meetings booked

 • Contributing ideas to improve prospecting strategy, messaging, targeting, and pipeline generation



What success looks like in this role



This is a performance-focused role. We are looking for someone who is proactive, commercially minded, and highly consistent with activity.



Success in this role would look like:

 • High daily outbound activity across calls,
s, and LinkedIn

 • Strong discipline around follow-up and pipeline hygiene

 • Qualified leads being generated consistently

 • Demos booked for the sales team

 • Good judgement in identifying businesses that are a fit for Linxio

 • Professional and confident communication with prospective clients



A strong SDR in this role knows how to keep momentum. Some days that means making a large volume of calls. Other days it means chasing up warm prospects, refining a list, or finding the right contact inside a company that looked cold at first.



Who we’re looking for



You’re probably a good fit if you are someone who enjoys outbound sales and doesn’t get rattled by rejection. You know that pipeline is built through consistent effort, sharp communication, and relentless follow-up.



We’d like to hear from people who have:

 • Experience in an SDR, BDR, lead generation, telemarketing, or outbound sales role

 • Confidence making a high volume of cold calls each day

 • Experience with cold
 outreach and LinkedIn prospecting

 • Familiarity with CRM and prospecting tools such as HubSpot, Apollo, Dripify, or similar platforms

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • A professional and confident phone manner

 • Good organisational skills and attention to detail

 • The ability to work independently from home and stay productive in a remote environment

 • A results-driven attitude and genuine motivation to generate leads and open opportunities



Bonus points if you have

 • Experience selling B2B software or SaaS

 • Experience selling into fleet, logistics, transport, operations, construction, field services, or related industries

 • Experience booking demos for an Account Executive or Sales Representative

 • A strong understanding of how to research accounts and identify decision-makers



Pay and benefits



This role offers:

 • Competitive full-time contractor rate

 • Performance-based bonus for every lead generated

 • Fully remote work from home arrangement

 • Opportunity to work with an established client account

 • Ongoing support, systems, and prospecting tools provided

 • A role with clear activity and performance expectations, where strong performers can stand out quickly



Important note



This is a contractor role, not an employee position. You will be engaged by Sprint Labs and assigned to work on there clients account.



How to apply



Please apply with:

 • Your resume

 • A short note introducing yourself

 • Details of your experience in outbound sales, cold calling, or lead generation

 • Any examples of tools you’ve used, such as HubSpot, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Dripify, or similar



If you’ve worked in a role where your day involved calling prospects, following up leads, and booking meetings, we’d love to hear from you.
